name: CaucusRoom
subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
You Tube restores Trump's Channel No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkdsll-trhiujldw-jr/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* The Stock Market reacts to **[banks failing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-y/)**.
* Jan 6th committee **[didn't view footage](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-j/)**.
* Dems are coming for **[your washing machine](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* As expected, **[Biden blames Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-i/)**.
* New study shows **[liberals are mentally ill](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-d/).**
* **[Biden doesn't do anything](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-h/) at 9 AM.**
* 96% of you**[agree with DeSantis](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-k/).**
* Swarm of **[migrants read about open border](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-u/) **on Facebook.
* **[Stacey Abrams](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-o/)** got a new job.
* US racing to**[recover drone](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-x/)** downed by Russia.
* Which **[unnamed Biden](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-m/)** got the money? Was it **[Hallie](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-c/)?**
* **[RINO's took money](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-q/)** from Bill Gates.
* Biden tweets **[fake letter written by a child](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-a/).**
* Middle School **[kids given bugs to eat](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-f/) **for climate change.
* Organized **[pantries are racist](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-z/).**
* **[The Tiger King](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-v/)** is running for President.

### **Xi Will Visit **
China's President **[Xi Jinping is set to visit Russia](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-e/)** next week in an apparent show of support for Vladimir Putin.
### **You Tube Restores Trump Channel**
**[YouTube has restored former President Trump's channel](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-s/), **more than two years after he was suspended from the platform indefinitely following the events of Jan. 6, 2021. **Hunter Sues Laptop Repairman** Attorneys for [**Hunter Biden filed a lawsuit against Delaware repair shop owner John Mac Isaac on Friday alleging invasion of privacy**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-g/). [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-yh/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-yk/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-yu/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdsll-trhiujldw-jl/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
800 Washington Ave Ste C
Golden, CO 80401 You are receiving this email because you are a member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-qkdsll-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-jy) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-qkdsll-trhiujldw-jj/)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
Have you seen Elizabeth Warren’s GENIUS plan? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
She just introduced the Youth Voting Rights Act to make it easier for young people to vote [!!] [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
The Youth Voting Rights Act will make it easier for young voters to register and harder for anti-democratic Republicans to suppress their votes.
ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Extremist Republicans are rolling back voting rights nationwide, it’s critical that we protect young voters from targeted restrictions.
Elizabeth Warren’s new plan would:
*
Allow
teens
to
pre-register
to
vote
before
turning
18
*
Expand
voter
registration
services
at
colleges
and
universities
*
Require
on-campus
polling
places
at
colleges
and
universities
*
AND
guarantee
that
states
accept
student
IDs
ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
In the 2020 election, roughly 50% of eligible 18-24 year olds voted.
Young people have had to overcome a pandemic, social inequities, and radical voter suppression to cast their first ballots. They deserve to have their rights protected.
This election is one of the most CONSEQUENTIAL elections of our lifetime. And with so many laws and policies being passed that directly affect them, they deserve a voice too.
That’s why Elizabeth Warren’s new plan is SO important! We’re collecting 10,000 signatures to show Liz she has our full support. Will you stand with us to empower young people and sign our petition to Co-Sponsor her Youth Voting Rights Act? [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Sign the Petition >> [https://action.demsofstate.org/a/young-vra-1-1-1-1]
Thank you,
Team DASS

Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions.
Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/skdk-dasspac-email-footer-062022?&refcode=DASS_EM_Ask_06132022&amount=5]

clean_body: [] Have you seen Elizabeth Warren’s GENIUS plan? [] She just introduced the Youth Voting Rights Act to make it easier for young people to vote [!!] [] The Youth Voting Rights Act will make it easier for young voters to register and harder for anti-democratic Republicans to suppress their votes. ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [] Sign the Petition >> [] Extremist Republicans are rolling back voting rights nationwide, it’s critical that we protect young voters from targeted restrictions. Elizabeth Warren’s new plan would: Allow teens to pre-register to vote before turning 18 Expand voter registration services at colleges and universities Require on-campus polling places at colleges and universities AND guarantee that states accept student IDs ADD YOUR NAME: Co-Sponsor Elizabeth Warren’s Youth Voting Rights Act! [] Sign the Petition >> [] In the 2020 election, roughly 50% of eligible 18-24 year olds voted. Young people have had to overcome a pandemic, social inequities, and radical voter suppression to cast their first ballots. They deserve to have their rights protected. Will you stand with us to empower young people and sign our petition to Co-Sponsor her Youth Voting Rights Act? name: Pro Life Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh0la3a81f99jhd1in0eo48ba4i61rqru96acgdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o31cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrf5fii837vlc4l0h5d1vh2ns6kvc9hcvq7b584g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o31cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znlnvi4b1bkqdiq7rfih4qe8vrk63e9kp16ldhro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o31cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Pro Life Update

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My thoughts about SVB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcdl2q5q96aitdiaqpkf58qlhv91vtm3gjb8drsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zqr4u9tfhf8sokrmc13bar8i74d03k2a0pp7j9i8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1p7vitf68q5qj5tkckqbufk3asb5bbp18mbm010_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zabkhevojs1khcucbjrr5mckg34ove9fj57a2qq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpcuk5s0fv7m61sb6ltasgfhc4ka92llo442rsg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zih1g5ob0aafudfpa897vdd6rh4dl9i6lktskuk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)**

[** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztpmjhgtl84o7mpc5hfbgnof5i0gke7ap3nlcrao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdf5lnuqvc0ms57bclra6t0oj8pog5rpa2803jvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znovv9ld4aacta5nqn14elumqldht7havno40280_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlf1kjv6gc28a31obga6lgcv9su562nvhku9iel8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zih5d4r5moi7ak3kbga7prqoshkganln4on1bg8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h60o36cph2bs)
---|---|---

name: Your America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01136%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2frA8BWAvybe83Giln4c8nw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01137%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DPwEPeJ8qeJURhNnAdQ06A&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01137%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DPwEPeJ8qeJURhNnAdQ06A&sysid=1) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdis5gon49k6s5gp7sfihpdjdgg1dc183sgvupa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6cor1c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk6ehtuqahgteriekrpll5ik7ac5u0pm79hcq378_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6cor1c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf6ngv0s82o3va6vjciec9fsj8c7ir5fmu08d00o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6cor1c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6c7ln25i1td73hfpcmm8u7hu6pgpbdgomquusj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6cor1c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark...

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqint0migdovj8jhl5no39t1q49hcmolv9pdto8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj2c9h2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5021f7f4jjhofmlq2e4olbb3dbe0mvg2oqdin8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj2c9h2bs)**

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark...

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztrocjicrgs1jrdd5sd3odr12ccgco0tudep1rlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4cdh2bs)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). name: Rand Paul
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi105ebu5jnh2l3letqda6nkg36dkhdln4rnjang_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It 's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8jd66ci6sea7b9ldb34sre2mfhi563nnjptcoq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers ' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children. "**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk1kva5irr6vijiq6351sep66trqlg8spea18apg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zft3pe3fh1rpa1btenvcpmto4qt2sba68gavids8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $25**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgj1ia530j3qnijrc6cd33knvi89639a36lujsto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcpntkl8bq4b3fs0l46h44442cqlp6eunmi8n3a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq1nt846m046cpli04kcaq7ne68mcu64jupc1jg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5gmahat7cma90to88tookurhlv0hm885vkpmt4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0n9s4asis9lr4p4sgsocu1ta6sr43js31ehquv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj9psf4gtltchcjim5sohna8avl3o4ot18ajf7vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztelduo3liq7cks2javhcviaf1nlnbqte7sknq38_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s9h6eoj4c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Senator Rand Paul

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450483:68cwqzGNN:m:1:3331421248:79214B5BECBB4C8C328BFB755931D4E0:r)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450483:68cwqzGNN:m:1:3331421248:79214B5BECBB4C8C328BFB755931D4E0:r) Hi Peter,

[Please give a critical donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450483:68cwqzGNN:m:1:3331421248:79214B5BECBB4C8C328BFB755931D4E0:r)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake).

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights... no due process... IN AMERICA!

**That's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

**" They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift RIGHT NOW.
](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450483:68cwqzGNN:m:1:3331421248:79214B5BECBB4C8C328BFB755931D4E0:r)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift more right away.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450483:68cwqzGNN:m:1:3331421248:79214B5BECBB4C8C328BFB755931D4E0:r)

---

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450341:Jh9PqzGMN:m:1:3365131770:F659DFB3E79839CB68478CFDA5FD3E9F:r)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450341:Jh9PqzGMN:m:1:3365131770:F659DFB3E79839CB68478CFDA5FD3E9F:r)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, __**[we must elect more faith-driven leaders.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450341:Jh9PqzGMN:m:1:3365131770:F659DFB3E79839CB68478CFDA5FD3E9F:r "we must elect more faith-driven leaders.")**__

---
| | [ELECT FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450341:Jh9PqzGMN:m:1:3365131770:F659DFB3E79839CB68478CFDA5FD3E9F:r)
---

We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence!

If you agree, _**[please consider donating today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450341:Jh9PqzGMN:m:1:3365131770:F659DFB3E79839CB68478CFDA5FD3E9F:r "please
consider donating today")**_ to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - _**not self-interest**_.

God Bless,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450340:Jh9PqzGMN:m:1:3365131770:F659DFB3E79839CB68478CFDA5FD3E9F:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

clean_body: | | | | | | | Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed. When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study. They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ. Since then, faith has been central to my life. I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book. | Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day. Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating. If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, "we must elect more faith-driven leaders." | | We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence! If you agree, "please consider donating today" to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - not self-interest. God Bless, | Mike Pompeo | | | | "Mike Pompeo Is Calling on All Conservatives to Join Him in Championing Our American Values" A SPECIAL NOTE FROM MIKE POMPEO Whether it's sending a spy balloon over our sensitive military installations, stealing our industrial secrets to undermine our economy, or making sure their surveillance and propaganda app is on every American's phone, the Chinese Communist Party is working day and night to make America weaker. name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We’re going on offense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | **McCarthy goes on offense, forcing Senate Democrats into tough votes**
_THE HILL_
If there's one thing you can count on right now, it's House Republicans.

_**-> We defied all odds and picked up seats in 2020.
-> We took the majority & FIRED Nancy Pelosi in 2022.
-> And now we are delivering on our Commitment to America.**_

Now, we are on offense yet again, backing Senate Democrats into a corner. Their votes on woke, America _LAST_ policies will be on the record for all voters to see come 2024.

**If there 's one thing you can count on, it's us. As I said in my speech the night I became your Speaker of the House - I will NEVER give up for you.**

Come 2024, we are going to EXPAND our majority, take the White House, and SWEEP Democrats out of power up and down the ballot.

As long as I've been GOP Leader (and now Speaker), all we have done in the House is WIN. I'm humbly asking you to help me keep my record up. I'm telling you, we are a good bet, and I'm urging you to make an investment into our future success.

**[Pitch in any amount, and I assure you that we will not let you down.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450018:6nTj4zGNJ:m:1:3391001263:833B79060A08C66A9253AC023DEE94EA:r "Pitch in just
$10, $25, or even $50 today, and I assure you that we will not let you down.")** You have my word as Speaker of the House, I will fight for you in Washington and on the campaign trail.

---
| | [SUPPORT HOUSE REPUBLICANS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450018:6nTj4zGNJ:m:1:3391001263:833B79060A08C66A9253AC023DEE94EA:r)
---

I hope to see your name on the list of brave patriots who answer this call to action.

Best,
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450018:6nTj4zGNJ:m:1:3391001263:833B79060A08C66A9253AC023DEE94EA:r)
---
Kevin McCarthy
Speaker of the House

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: You, I, and the people we love are in GRAVE danger.
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450531:JIm85zGGN:m:1:3365131770:91B637F065F12E5259B1D1B0C30FE375:r)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450531:JIm85zGGN:m:1:3365131770:91B637F065F12E5259B1D1B0C30FE375:r) Hi Peter,

[Please give a critical donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450531:JIm85zGGN:m:1:3365131770:91B637F065F12E5259B1D1B0C30FE375:r)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn't attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete's sake).

Zach didn't break anything, or even hurt anyone's feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he's a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden's Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What's more, he hasn't had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach's disability payments because he'd been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged - not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights... no due process... IN AMERICA!

**That's why I've filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

**" They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can't happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you."
**
That's why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!
**
And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift RIGHT NOW.
](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450531:JIm85zGGN:m:1:3365131770:91B637F065F12E5259B1D1B0C30FE375:r)
I'm using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden "Gestapo Police State!" This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift more right away.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450531:JIm85zGGN:m:1:3365131770:91B637F065F12E5259B1D1B0C30FE375:r)

---

name: 4Patriots
subject: A solar generator... worth its weight in GOLD
body:
Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark...

Jim and his family lost power recently. Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator - a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes. _**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_ **[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=97dff6168e254c41a03a28623105317a&_e=jjI5E_e-kVTt4L9ZlyyszGke0tn5Zd3RhkDDi97KGccXLAkJl2yVJBLlVqPh8a9uJPROYO5hPxg-09w2l4zhoi0yik1FjXmnTcqhf8zxSBjPlBjfubcBQybvZOYR8dYwohp0UVDc5xjjgQbKjHSFvyORbvbe_YrSZVvbmJ_eTl0bF-4HyMFppKSwahQMVTekQYmh1AM8Fl2UeqmPUGMKAEEdLiJCsWyYNGcoC_qV-8-n6wT2Q7tgCsJIuVHWbfciB06z1FxGsLMmlD2eLyW2OO5PF-XBdi53rbzsc1tjg8w%3D)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark... _"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up._ _I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light and 4 cell phones and kept them charged._ _The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding._ _My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim. Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock. The little workhorse of a generator is so popular... **We even had a waiting list last time we sold out - __thousands__ of names long.** You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer). The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about. No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either. Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too - no complicated instructions to fuss over. And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited. So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today. You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out. **[>> See what all the hoopla is about and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=97dff6168e254c41a03a28623105317a&_e=jjI5E_e-kVTt4L9ZlyyszGke0tn5Zd3RhkDDi97KGccXLAkJl2yVJBLlVqPh8a9uJPROYO5hPxg-09w2l4zhoi0yik1FjXmnTcqhf8zxSBjPlBjfubcBQybvZOYR8dYwohp0UVDc5xjjgQbKjHSFv6D_Yj3-WG42_Np9wcOUVPh3R18Pqs_nrCw00EZYNVHPM1gerORYG19Hyj0fbUxqovGfRo09rSF5i1FD0uptk6J_JZ5HsVhF_oqw0FqXFvhAkyJabVvxbzYZ5n5U5sP99tfexEX0uXrEvBEBHDZLqWQ%3D)**

name: Kash Patel
subject: Taking the fight to corrupt teachers unions
body:
Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=644174ee5c064d8199614744a0d5b156&_e=3MKo6fPbWlmxZtOG4PC8jBkFT8WYDukMfRP3AguW574NO-OWbROCW-SvSKYfTPh4u64c8fkmKK-a1ly0SXC87_HsZel4f6EcmkAZW8zAmPSaKIlr7kby2Rva-SCUoAfsujMt6_dLxatSyAyo_1PiM902cEwFVp_3qgSu8-Q9i7r-tC7X5Z2F-I3wgu354u_lYyidoPmrA_7DRKGhVfSWDc3TkFUTXorT1eZJg65R3V2xUyFXLz6-9kJst2ZRO8-g4_mM6INo-XTRVmRK1oBJ_z-toELK0EMrsiq8U_29HZc%3D)
Friend,

Socialists are teaching your children to hate America.

They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math.

_It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world._

I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, **Parents Union of America (PUOA).**

I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts.

[_**Friend, can I count on you to share my support for PUOA? Click here to donate $10, $25, $50, or any amount today >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=644174ee5c064d8199614744a0d5b156&_e=3MKo6fPbWlmxZtOG4PC8jBkFT8WYDukMfRP3AguW574NO-OWbROCW-SvSKYfTPh4u64c8fkmKK-a1ly0SXC87_HsZel4f6EcmkAZW8zAmPSaKIlr7kby2Rva-SCUoAfsujMt6_dLxatSyAyo_1PiMwjxafNZW_5GPgU0-R--BIEC-A_ANz8h_yEgNdTGaSjBAnV8IlzRJJ6ILsUtXZORhKSrjQ4m_TkzWVnc2Luvv7eoONO9GVUqKwWV8ln2qAKMnD_Gul4zoaaAs2Hjg1xb9_bos6TKRN02CfYxnwxX7sc%3D)

I want to share a message from PUOA:

_**" We stand as a counter-offensive **__**against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union**_ _**, which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children."**_

_Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union_.

Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union.

**I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame.**

We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools.

[_**Will you join the fight to save America 's schools from the corrupt Teacher's Union? Please send your urgent donation NOW >>> **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=644174ee5c064d8199614744a0d5b156&_e=3MKo6fPbWlmxZtOG4PC8jBkFT8WYDukMfRP3AguW574NO-OWbROCW-SvSKYfTPh4u64c8fkmKK-a1ly0SXC87_HsZel4f6EcmkAZW8zAmPSaKIlr7kby2Rva-SCUoAfsujMt6_dLxatSyAyo_1PiMxSpFbroi25b9NTDjypYrDfceTyXavXKDeCw5kFhUQC8pUrnnD1EdfpelAjDp4sosw_xO9rvxECWRFizsnUlEli3Jypayi9yzSScBT2b4TD8InZ9suABB78ObVf51bvFQviUzk1YRjSikKC41WSkDN0%3D)

PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents.

They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive.

**Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. **

I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America?

** Click below to send your gift.**
[_**Donate $10**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=644174ee5c064d8199614744a0d5b156&_e=3MKo6fPbWlmxZtOG4PC8jBkFT8WYDukMfRP3AguW574NO-OWbROCW-SvSKYfTPh4u64c8fkmKK-a1ly0SXC87_HsZel4f6EcmkAZW8zAmPSaKIlr7kby2Rva-SCUoAfsBqp24owhvaTsdZjiJo0Tk9DyJZm9p0tS8OVAtivW_bzHPqHR0HaAJ2bAGAm9U_xQZek2LzBxcCUyVXGbOll3xhZrnlTVVsqObrlqZ4rfx4lf8WhZnGW4eqSXgOMxJzhOSYH2X8s3Rc1onfpQ2LASgQ1Dy7jxNVEEbCsJqOQirZ8%3D)

clean_body: Socialists are teaching your children to hate America. Friend, Socialists are teaching your children to hate America. They have taken over classrooms and indoctrinated hundreds of thousands of students with Critical Race Theory. They would rather focus lessons on pronouns and gender identity than teach trade skills, science, or basic math. It's no wonder our kids have developed the highest levels of anxiety and depression in the world. I'd like to introduce you to an organization that is leading the fight to take back our school boards from the radical Left and protect our children, Parents Union of America (PUOA). I just talked with Jessi Melton, President of PUOA, and told her that I would reach out to my supporters and help raise $15,000 this week to fund their efforts. I want to share a message from PUOA: " We stand as a counter-offensive against the powerful, agenda-driven Teachers' Union , which has systematically sought to destroy wholesome American values and indoctrinate our children." Parents Union of America is the ANTI teachers-union. Their mission is to target the most populous school districts and remove the incompetent school board members put in place by the Anti-American, corrupt Teachers' Union. I, for one, am sick and tired of socialists indoctrinating our children. And the corrupt Teacher Unions are to blame. We can't allow the same people who turn a blind eye to inappropriate textbook material and socialist indoctrination to remain in charge of American schools. PUOA does more than fight to remove corrupt school board members. They work to fill school boards with America-First candidates and parents. They plan to replace corrupt school board members with America-First candidates. They recruit and train conservative candidates and raise money to get them elected. These candidates MUST display the ability and willingness to fight for conservative values by going on the offensive. Parents Union of America refuses to stay on the defensive when our children are involved. I know this is a lot to ask, but can you help me keep my promise to raise $15,000 this week for Parents Union of America? Click below to send your gift. Thank you, Senator Rand Paul Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f3b75f9865334b81b013bff063456e67&_e=sAt3MN4efejbJDN3OLTn-E3tpG6oJZ1QVlT5RdMjE315eEyAXZrOob_g5Z2Rvrvs0m-CeEi9yGVOlTAWPJSbhINU5wmngFaaD1E831Vay6ShqAgXWH7qAr9iPvpj_Y1urPrPJdP0n9e4-YDqDylrXLfO1dDoBed38Re1KUe9bHrjm4TNeP1Id-6hPtsabvNpP8SFEKICE6fdMTiwm6szhGDp62KIBInHZ1E5zkRTBii0DtOrzSGpOFODiMWNKEdLouVtS0gV4xtJbj9YCwPUMO5EvuLSSKZ1JbZscxyXhKVAiHKrkplrag-QT_nu4n0aXClWoH8yRDJ86Gyb69P0wDjbizq3k_bi5mMPCmYbWo8kpRO7-7p8uigJUZ4WpsbgI6a4B9eV8UzMnsiUAe1bgQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f3b75f9865334b81b013bff063456e67&_e=sAt3MN4efejbJDN3OLTn-E3tpG6oJZ1QVlT5RdMjE315eEyAXZrOob_g5Z2Rvrvs0m-CeEi9yGVOlTAWPJSbhINU5wmngFaaD1E831Vay6ShqAgXWH7qAr9iPvpj_Y1urPrPJdP0n9e4-YDqDylrXLfO1dDoBed38Re1KUe9bHrjm4TNeP1Id-6hPtsabvNpP8SFEKICE6fdMTiwm6szhGDp62KIBInHZ1E5zkRTBii0DtOrzSGpOFODiMWNKEdLaUWe9IQLJL5D-_ny3aiyjvTr7s3tDNxMwzPj-8GrPj9Dr_xj0iT-ufuPF6gTuRpjOoOVjvbksKbVPhETWCqzRJRRnvWwtB6cVpzrF8NrnReG6mhg8x6i2GWzD3sY_fUIlIDMeG4Xq_oHylKANwZSQg%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f3b75f9865334b81b013bff063456e67&_e=sAt3MN4efejbJDN3OLTn-E3tpG6oJZ1QVlT5RdMjE315eEyAXZrOob_g5Z2Rvrvs0m-CeEi9yGVOlTAWPJSbhINU5wmngFaaD1E831Vay6ShqAgXWH7qAr9iPvpj_Y1urPrPJdP0n9e4-YDqDylrXLfO1dDoBed38Re1KUe9bHrjm4TNeP1Id-6hPtsabvNpP8SFEKICE6fdMTiwm6szhGDp62KIBInHZ1E5zkRTBii0DtOrzSGpOFODiMWNKEdLhe2DB8OPXn4VYnHJjsI4MjFYfxVkB2sF-TVA2PBZQpcBJDvx9vXWTv0DF49tBjuD745-U3nw-vvPm6U9aOesi5FxtyOSwe9Snp2PtNbQVz8zBIVMIyo4mI76DQOiV6ge84YaqOQ1i9sZo6d1QDE6uQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653552%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YZ2k%2bQg2qHIu2AN5BVLIXg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653553%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DSqAgQdjopuEIiaXpjsNnQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653554%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=58ndW94ysvvV3gmYqQDybA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

|

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: How I Found God
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450343:6WXoUzGN5:m:1:3331421248:73FD482075961AD92299DDC998DEE383:r)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450343:6WXoUzGN5:m:1:3331421248:73FD482075961AD92299DDC998DEE383:r)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, __**[we must elect more faith-driven leaders.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450343:6WXoUzGN5:m:1:3331421248:73FD482075961AD92299DDC998DEE383:r "we must elect more
faith-driven leaders.")**__

---
| | [ELECT FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450343:6WXoUzGN5:m:1:3331421248:73FD482075961AD92299DDC998DEE383:r)
---

We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence!

If you agree, _**[please consider donating today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450343:6WXoUzGN5:m:1:3331421248:73FD482075961AD92299DDC998DEE383:r "please consider donating today")**_ to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - _**not self-interest**_.

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450344:6WXoUzGN5:m:1:3331421248:73FD482075961AD92299DDC998DEE383:r)
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=205962690b8567fe5e58ac6baa71afc98593d3ae90147e0fc86e68d4a0bcc659eda7db008702a836afdfd169232728dc6f67c92025f2f8bc Peter, My parents weren’t political when I was growing up. Growing up, I learned independence by refusing to be an outsider in my own community. I learned integrity by watching my parents succeed in America. I learned compassion by feeling how much ignorance hurts and seeing how understanding heals. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=205962690b8567fe5e58ac6baa71afc98593d3ae90147e0fc86e68d4a0bcc659eda7db008702a836afdfd169232728dc6f67c92025f2f8bc JOIN MY TEAM I never thought of a life in politics. It was a world I knew nothing about and didn’t care about. From what I could see, politicians were people on TV who claimed to be working for us but too often seemed to be busy promoting themselves. In school, being in student government or even taking a political science class was never for me. Instead, I thought I would have a future in business. I always loved numbers, and in the world of business, numbers tell stories that are fascinating to me. That’s how I got my start. When I was 13, I started doing the books at my mom’s store. When I returned to our family business, after earning an accounting degree, I learned how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for the government to take it away. My mom told me not to complain but do something about it. So, I did. That’s when I ran for state legislature. I didn’t know that you weren’t supposed to run against a 30-year incumbent. But being the underdog didn’t matter to me. I wanted to fight to make a difference. So, I reached out to every person I could. I told them why I wanted to work for them. I won. I immediately got to work. I fought for government transparency, stood up to reckless spending, and worked for the people of my district. Then I ran for governor. I was the underdog once again, but I fought and won. I challenged the status quo in the state house and as governor and fought for legislation that would make a difference, from transparency in government and voter ID laws, to strengthening the economy and championing education. I’ve worn many hats throughout my life. I’m an accountant, the mom of two, a proud wife of a combat veteran, the daughter of immigrants who came here legally, and a strong conservative. I’ve served as governor and UN Ambassador. Most importantly, I’m a proud American who knows our best days are yet to come if we unite to save our country. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=205962690b8567fe7614d03054a8eb66e6f90717aca8323110cb3d45e41e502309a7f6f670e4caecd3395b7f9504f44f625fc7318163997f Will you join me in this fight? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=205962690b8567fe5e58ac6baa71afc98593d3ae90147e0fc86e68d4a0bcc659eda7db008702a836afdfd169232728dc6f67c92025f2f8bc JOIN MY TEAM I’m running for president because I know Americans deserve better. |
#### **Alaskans For Honest Elections (Repeal Rank Choice Voting)**
#### **Vs**
#### **Alaskans For Better Elections (Pro-Ranked Choice Voting)**
#### [**Watch Today By Clicking Here**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Ffb.watch%2FjmSZar4Ruq%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=NSgSHj-471clYd5SdULygYcTXU0%3D)

**Eagle River / Chugiak Can Sign Monday 12-6 March 20th / Tuesday 10-6 March 21st / Trust Worthy Hardware ER**
---
[“Ranked choice voting is the product of millions of dollars from non-Alaskan, dark-money advertisements, which were spoon-fed to Alaskans by a barrage of ads before the election.” ](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.adn.com%2Fopinions%2Fletters%2F2023%2F03%2F05%2Fletter-end-ranked-choice-voting%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR0rh087RsDvZkhljKpaIwKYLeJ90GPwpDxCSeDQ5wlOlobKQOs1WynmmiY&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=ZGslePlFv1wenQx1LaCltRBPkZw%3D) Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system [during a podcast appearance with Donald Trump Jr.](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Frumble.com%2Fv27a5jw-1-on-1-with-the-speaker-of-the-house-in-nancy-pelosis-former-office.html&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=6MHyBm84uAzIRevNt-O4KuMZBwk%3D) Business Insider["Someone could get the most votes, and not win!" said McCarthy. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=OEQyrmhwLk_iBv8-EsqdGvrr5ag%3D) Business Insider
---
#### **We had a conversation with #ChatGPT Artificial Intelligence about Ranked Choice Voting. Read the screenshots below to see the Ai’s responses.**
---
**Can we correlate low voter turnout to bad voter education? If there is a new voting system such as ranked choice voting and the education campaign is not sufficient?**

### **450+ At Our Anchorage Event, Over 1,000 at the Palmer Train Depot, Over 600 over 3 days in Fairbanks.**

#### **Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!!
Dan Powell 907-942-1312
Thank You Dan!!!**

If you are outside of Anchorage and want to watch the Kickoff, please click here or see our Facebook Page**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fprofile.php%3Fid%3D100088118914747&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=GB1w-dPYXMfEodk9JlF7BtFvMzw%3D)

#### **Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!!**
---
#### [**Click Here to See Our Store and Show Your Support**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fstore%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D641721f06468540a5effdfb8%26ss_email_id%3D641724100b761c4c90c870da%26ss_campaign_name%3DWatch%2Bthe%2BDebate%2B%252F%2BDiscussion%2B%252F%2BAi%2BChat%2Babout%2BRanked%2BChoice%2Band%2BSigning%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-19T15%253A02%253A56Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=C34EHvysO7y7A3xSmx-V3_uEU34%3D)
---
#### **More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family**
---
**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
---
|
---
### **Come Sign Today**
#### **Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book
[https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2Fpetition-signatures%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D641721f06468540a5effdfb8%26ss_email_id%3D641724100b761c4c90c870da%26ss_campaign_name%3DWatch%2Bthe%2BDebate%2B%252F%2BDiscussion%2B%252F%2BAi%2BChat%2Babout%2BRanked%2BChoice%2Band%2BSigning%25E2%2580%25A6%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-03-19T15%253A02%253A56Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=0kLga5dlgU9qDBxuJp-n5euqy0U%3D)Please use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives.
[https://akleg.gov/Districts.php](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=641724100b761c4c90c870da&u=https%3A%2F%2Fakleg.gov%2FDistricts.php&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_641721f06468540a5effdfb8&l=en-US&s=A5YoNrUlypMGFIc_wFcSFQxofXE%3D)**To get involved please email**[**Admin@AlaskansForHonestElections.com**](mailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact)

|

---
|
