### Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers!
---
**We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.****1.** Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures**(Completed November 23rd, 2022)****2.** After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.**(Completed January 20th, 2023)****3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.****4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this.**
---
[_ _ Call Us or Text Us Here _ _](tel:+19078028116)
---
---
|
---
**Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!****99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.****Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.****Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.****This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.****Rank Choice creates division and bitterness.**
---
[_ _ Email Us Today _ _](mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter)

Send them our website to sign up. | | | | Alaskans For Honest Elections (Repeal Rank Choice Voting) Vs Alaskans For Better Elections (Pro-Ranked Choice Voting) | Eagle River / Chugiak Can Sign Monday 12-6 March 20th / Tuesday 10-6 March 21st / Trust Worthy Hardware ER Letter To The Editor Anchorage Daily NewsAs recently as January, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy trashed the system Business Insider Business Insider We had a conversation with #ChatGPT Artificial Intelligence about Ranked Choice Voting. Read the screenshots below to see the Ai’s responses. Can we correlate low voter turnout to bad voter education? If there is a new voting system such as ranked choice voting and the education campaign is not sufficient? | | | 450+ At Our Anchorage Event, Over 1,000 at the Palmer Train Depot, Over 600 over 3 days in Fairbanks. Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!! Dan Powell 907-942-1312 Thank You Dan!!! Help Us Gather Signatures Today, Sign Up On Our Website or Send Us an Email!!! More Signing Dates Below, Make Sure To Share with Friends & Family admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans” An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!! | Come Sign Today Want To Sign The First Petition To Get Rid Of Rank Choice Voting!!! There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000. Link to sign up for a Petition Book use the link below to find your house district or include your address if you do not know your house district. Scroll to the bottom and it has a search by address, which should tell you Your House and Senate Representatives. get involved please emailmailto:admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com?subject=Newsletter%20Contact | | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! We have completed two parts to the Petition Process, please read 3 and 4 below to learn about the next steps.1. Collect 100 Sponsor Signatures(Completed November 23rd, 2022)2. After the Lt. Governor approves our initiative, we will need to collect 10% of the most recent General Election, which is the lowest turnout in 12 years, so our actual signatures needed will be less than 40,000. At this point (December-January 2022) we are collecting sponsor signatures to take a lead roll in removing Ranked Choice Voting from Alaska.(Completed January 20th, 2023)3\. We now need to collect signatures from at least 30,000 Registered Alaskan Voters, we will receive 500 Petition Books, each Book contains 150 Signatures. We need help, please see our timeline and either email, call, or text us if you would like to get involved.4\. We will need signatures from 75% of the House Districts, We plan to collect signatures from 100% of the 40 House Districts. We will need to collect 10% of the total number of voters in the previous election in each House District. Please let us know if you have questions about this. tel:+19078028116 | Rank choice was sold to Alaska by outsiders as a means to control dark money. Outsiders put more of their money than ever before in our elections. It did not work!99% of their funding came from out of Alaska.Rank Choice voting has proven to discourage voter turnout. This past election had the lowest turn out since 2010. It is so complicated that 1000’s did not vote.Some voters, votes are counted 2 or 3 times. Not fair! It should be 1 person 1 vote.This is not a partisan issue. Rank Choice voting affected everyone. In at least 1 race the Democrat received less that 15% of the vote.Rank Choice creates division and bitterness. mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR HONEST ELECTIONS. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. | | Alaskans For Honest Elections 2521 E. Mtn Village Dr Ste B #904 Wasilla, AK USA

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Is there a cash crisis in America? Deadline March 21
body:
It's the second-largest bank collapse in history.

| Dear Reader, It's the second-largest bank collapse in history. Second only to Washington Mutual when it went under in 2008. Of course, I am talking about the sudden demise of Silicon Valley Bank... The 16th largest bank in the U.S. Where an actual run on the bank happened... With people in line waiting to withdraw their money. Then Signature Bank in NY was shut down by regulators. Making it the second massive bank failure in 3 days. These events beg the question...Is your bank safe? Is your money safe? Ph.D. economist, investigative journalist, and former global investment banker Dr. Nomi Prins is cautioning individuals about what's next for America. And she reveals the exact steps she recommends you take to protect your future. She calls it the "New American Era Blueprint." **[You can get all the details here.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef8ba6522aad4f3eb05209ce383cf4e9&_e=ulje3mil8mMHfFr4iOgMXwwY6tuJlScnChUSsjESv0-7Xdl8yzW8Bwgsncnt9w1aTPomKOrZ-cXG5UukzLCo7TOR4kHt7TeMW-UYraPe0GhXHw_ioFc2LBNRDt4CkrlfU1pN1oBdR61eeKmsF2xbkBkeh6AkgQl3uuZZugceuW7r_VP-7OTdoqkE3hkNg-Mo0FGE7qK5FtQ6ZwK4UyAliQfblO_NAnFUtneff2Xi50sNgFzPkUOjjqmP5Jb_MPBa)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_ **P.S.** This message is time sensitive. You must watch it before March 21. **[Click here.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef8ba6522aad4f3eb05209ce383cf4e9&_e=ulje3mil8mMHfFr4iOgMXwwY6tuJlScnChUSsjESv0-7Xdl8yzW8Bwgsncnt9w1aTPomKOrZ-cXG5UukzLCo7TOR4kHt7TeMW-UYraPe0GgiYlcxWYFVjVtuzDVKtvWQ_VjOrgQsfmRuOESn9WjQYgEaP9P077OYoU0HKRlxEI9V5tItp-4HAsnFM2QikZN4MvweRP3W-2OmbMBRFD-Wh0yUhQCJK1dsmp_dyVC_SdTaYabbA0y8y7qNUy2pz17L)**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3409a37136224f5a986e940305195fab&_e=rcmlxh4Ph1XPTTto_RqQtDj9oizsGgUsIu8AMWHlYj2qICkw8HIuIQTKdhqSmQRgIDmE7_WhRJILjUh2MoRgmjciKwZs-XsvDM7onv1M5qewnlStDdt7-7XJodPnLVWuP3QXhoPl7AvSKRvbOZ7Q0HgQ9VzDdLL_IcNuoXE3BF4S43NCi2kbxW1QXeO4wIda5BkvflZhJ65eQbepvBN9qJ_ik4d6s__V44tjFD8wTdsDPBBaSacBu8XHKLqTd4XrGq37hPeKTTNDAnZIILR5jVIut_Aucfsu4-CTm8_9Pp-MYssN0Tk275xbk1o-_wcDCxjGQIr65AIYoRHc2oTxFcQD1mdP52Nem5RtuCWpXEZlAWB2T-q7hiZbipo-9zIPGPGy0CfUFpjKj76PDxRSlw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3409a37136224f5a986e940305195fab&_e=rcmlxh4Ph1XPTTto_RqQtDj9oizsGgUsIu8AMWHlYj2qICkw8HIuIQTKdhqSmQRgIDmE7_WhRJILjUh2MoRgmjciKwZs-XsvDM7onv1M5qewnlStDdt7-7XJodPnLVWuP3QXhoPl7AvSKRvbOZ7Q0HgQ9VzDdLL_IcNuoXE3BF4S43NCi2kbxW1QXeO4wIda5BkvflZhJ65eQbepvBN9qJ_ik4d6s__V44tjFD8wTdsDPBBaSacBu8XHKLqTd4XrMgMCPYYfn2kDQo24mAXvaKU-hzOBeK6Es4gmeudPP3DeQrvOMSS--cQ1HN2t6WXlRl1QPMxgmoE0hmplWRfHjoO1QNDS5DUGNP57P8WPaS_--HcjXG-Np2Ilf7qOE9dW8Axf6F6bj86CVtelS4kZDw%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3409a37136224f5a986e940305195fab&_e=rcmlxh4Ph1XPTTto_RqQtDj9oizsGgUsIu8AMWHlYj2qICkw8HIuIQTKdhqSmQRgIDmE7_WhRJILjUh2MoRgmjciKwZs-XsvDM7onv1M5qewnlStDdt7-7XJodPnLVWuP3QXhoPl7AvSKRvbOZ7Q0HgQ9VzDdLL_IcNuoXE3BF4S43NCi2kbxW1QXeO4wIda5BkvflZhJ65eQbepvBN9qJ_ik4d6s__V44tjFD8wTdsDPBBaSacBu8XHKLqTd4Xr_RQlzOdIJrMCcJcbP9pCsQ-1aiy8-8aw48ADTzYbot63ERjyGOO2gXYht0t9x6SKmUnv2Qg7-wNNWV18nN1qmbc7RCDjip7Y0NESmIlWgShWOLfDIxBSVyz99-jl-gQI7xQ6dVwkcJpBbibyRS2-7A%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They used her like a lab rat
body:
Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._

name: Jasmyn Jordan
subject: Leftists called me – a black female conservative – a WHITE SUPREMACIST
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451038:JAkz0zGNB:m:1:3365131770:C415F81F9B54D4371EF2F565D9CDC515:r)
---
Peter, I'm a student at the University of Iowa. My peers in college called me a "white supremacist," "a token," "a bigot," and a "Nazi." Why? **Because I 'm a black conservative female who believes America is not a racist country.** When I was attacked by my university's Black Student Union for not buying into their leftist ideology, I thought I was alone. **But I found a conservative family at college through Young America 's Foundation (YAF), where I was finally surrounded by like-minded friends who love America, the constitution, and free enterprise.** YAF changed my life. And they need your help today. [**Would you consider giving a tax-deductible donation to Young America 's Foundation so they can change the lives of more students like me?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451038:JAkz0zGNB:m:1:3365131770:C415F81F9B54D4371EF2F565D9CDC515:r) My name is Jasmyn Jordan. You may have heard of Young America's Foundation before as the leading youth outreach organization in America. YAF inspires large student audiences in high schools and colleges with your conservative ideas. I'm proud to be the vice president of my YAF chapter at the University of Iowa. The Left on campus hates that I'm a conservative. But I'm proud to be, and so grateful to be a leader in YAF. YAF provides students with a nationwide campus lecture program, featuring prominent conservative leaders, including **Ben Shapiro** , **Kellyanne Conway** , **Matt Walsh** , **Dinesh D 'Souza**, **Larry Elder** , Dr. **Arthur Laffer** , **Katie Pavlich** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens** , and many others. You may have heard that Young America's Foundation as the organization that saved President Ronald Reagan's Ranch in Santa Barbara, California, and the Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois for future generations! YAF also provides young people with a "Schoolhouse for Reaganism," the Reagan Ranch Center, to teach students President Reagan's ideas and preserve his conservative legacy. In addition, **Young America 's Foundation leads the Conservative Movement teaching your conservative ideas on YouTube** with more than one million subscribers! YouTube is the #1 social media site used by young people. Through YouTube, YAF provides young Americans with full, impactful, feature-length conservative programs. [**Your tax-deductible donation to Young America 's Foundation could help minority students who have been taught to hate America and hate white people to instead embrace traditional American values.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451038:JAkz0zGNB:m:1:3365131770:C415F81F9B54D4371EF2F565D9CDC515:r) Your tax-deductible donation will be changing the hearts and minds of students who desperately need an alternative viewpoint to the liberal ideology pushed on them in America's classrooms. [**Any amount you can give to YAF today -- will inspire young people to love (not hate) America and adopt your conservative viewpoint!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451038:JAkz0zGNB:m:1:3365131770:C415F81F9B54D4371EF2F565D9CDC515:r) It's terrifying to see how a **hatred for America** has gripped my generation. **But I 'm living proof as a black conservative student that you can reach even the most impressionable students with your conservative values. ** Young America's Foundation is changing the tide and growing the Conservative Movement with new, young activists ready to dedicate their lives to freedom's cause. They need your help with this special mission. Thank you for helping Young America's Foundation today. And thank you for helping young Americans like me grow firm in our conservative values.
---
Gratefully,
---
Jasmyn Jordan Sophomore, University of Iowa

subject: Is there a cash crisis in America? Deadline March 21
body:
It's the second-largest bank collapse in history.

| Dear Reader, It's the second-largest bank collapse in history. Second only to Washington Mutual when it went under in 2008. Of course, I am talking about the sudden demise of Silicon Valley Bank... The 16th largest bank in the U.S. Where an actual run on the bank happened... With people in line waiting to withdraw their money. Then Signature Bank in NY was shut down by regulators. Making it the second massive bank failure in 3 days. These events beg the question...Is your bank safe? Is your money safe? Ph.D. economist, investigative journalist, and former global investment banker Dr. Nomi Prins is cautioning individuals about what's next for America. And she reveals the exact steps she recommends you take to protect your future. She calls it the "New American Era Blueprint." **[You can get all the details here.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec2c5599fe4c49b390d7808e7bb3e7da&_e=fV7Ew6g8Hg9RNvvFdOC3SpjB3HIWsisCybSCIJcnsF3M1CCF8Tau7xpu_fhVCv5xXGEMzE31z3MuFkyR9lXvJciyKV6bt0xRm4syJoE78du5tmU3hO4dtUCZ47mHNfSWlpUcZgff72rQ8f9mvxhjb6QGYKdGI7_oN-xHTw0uvWDyp4k4BHS2_2JQLuD00avw52WhLANDjbmK6ELSFLBvKAWCQNOEj4mKb6YeCk0wf1GbvgshUQE4iZtn0rIF7gC6)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_ **P.S.** This message is time sensitive. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

Senator Ron Johnson is one of our top Senators tasked with setting our strategy to win in 2024, and he can't do that without YOUR response. Hurry. Thank you, Senate Republicans \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Senator Ron Johnson Date: 03/06/2023 Subject: 2023 Census Peter, it's Senator Ron Johnson. I need you to do me a small favor. You've done a lot to fight for Republicans over the years. In fact, our records indicate that you're one of the most active grassroots conservatives in your community. That 's why I've selected YOU to represent your area in the 2023 NRSC Nationwide Census. It's extremely important for you to complete your brief survey as soon as possible. Your responses will represent your entire area, and it will provide my colleagues and I with the critical information we need to build a winning strategy for 2024. Out of the thousands of conservatives in your area, I chose you because of your relentless support in our fight against the radical Left. I trust I made the right decision, and I hope you won't let me down. Thank you, Senator Ron Johnson Wisconsin ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t responded to my March Priorities Survey, **and I’m planning to follow up with the results of this survey in the next couple of days.**
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work in the months ahead, the initial response was overwhelming. **That’s why we’ve decided to re-open this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
Peter, I vow to do whatever it takes to fight for the safety and security of you and your loved ones, but I can only do this if I know where your priorities lie.
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my March Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:****[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-priorities-0223](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60394913/396998623/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1014-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FmMjlhOC01NmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu8K6pGH2ZNqCnRBmJLWja4CwCAKHLdBCVfrkFwgjS4=&emci=9b8a4a11-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7caf29a8-56c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you for your help here.

Letitia James \-------------Forwarded Message--------------- Sender: Letitia James Date: Mar 18, 2023 Subject: Please update your priorities, Peter
| | |
---

Peter, in a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**take my March 2023 Priorities Survey**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60394914/396998624/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1014-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FmMjlhOC01NmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu8K6pGH2ZNqCnRBmJLWja4CwCAKHLdBCVfrkFwgjS4=&emci=9b8a4a11-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7caf29a8-56c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504) – but first, I wanted to explain why I value your opinion so much.

I didn’t grow up with any real power or privilege. While New York’s elites catered directly to the powerful and wealthy, families like my own in Brooklyn were left out of any and all decisions.

So, when this team made history in 2018 by helping me become the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way.

I created my priorities survey to connect with my base and give folks like you a platform to use your voice – **but it looks like you STILL haven’t updated your priorities with my team.**

[**Please, Peter: Will you take my priorities survey now so I can fight for the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60394915/396998625/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1014-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FmMjlhOC01NmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu8K6pGH2ZNqCnRBmJLWja4CwCAKHLdBCVfrkFwgjS4=&emci=9b8a4a11-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7caf29a8-56c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
| | **MARCH 2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
---
_Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard._
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60394916/396998626/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1014-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FmMjlhOC01NmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu8K6pGH2ZNqCnRBmJLWja4CwCAKHLdBCVfrkFwgjS4=&emci=9b8a4a11-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7caf29a8-56c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
I’ll be honest: Our fight for progress is nowhere near complete. Right now, millions of people are still without reproductive freedom, the housing crisis is continuing to sprawl out of control, and the gun violence epidemic is still claiming innocent lives of all ages.

**With the fundamental rights of millions being attacked from all sides, it is _vital_ that I know what matters most to supporters like you, Peter. That’s why I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to complete my priorities survey so I know which fights are most important to the people I represent in this new political landscape.

[Please, so that I can fight for you, will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60394917/396998627/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1014-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FmMjlhOC01NmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu8K6pGH2ZNqCnRBmJLWja4CwCAKHLdBCVfrkFwgjS4=&emci=9b8a4a11-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7caf29a8-56c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60394918/396998628/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1014-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2FmMjlhOC01NmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pu8K6pGH2ZNqCnRBmJLWja4CwCAKHLdBCVfrkFwgjS4=&emci=9b8a4a11-d5c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7caf29a8-56c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

That’s why I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to complete my priorities survey so I know which fights are most important to the people I represent in this new political landscape. | | Thank you for making your voice heard. Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

Friend,
You’re our country’s only hope.
If the current Democrat regime can get away with threatening to arrest its biggest political opponent, then our once great Republic will have fully descended into a third-world tyranny.
**But make no mistake: This isn’t about me. It’s about _YOU_.**
**The regime wants to intimidate YOU out of voting for someone who is not beholden to the globalist ruling class.**
**_So, if you are angered by these threats toward me for having committed NO CRIME, I ask that you peacefully show your support for our America First movement._**
**_I don’t ask that you do it for me – I ask that you do it for yourself and your country._**
**If America is to remain a free Republic, then we MUST show the Left that their intimidation tactics will NEVER stop the citizens of our country from choosing our own future.**
_We will win the White House. We will obliterate the Deep State. We will once again put America first. And we will Make America Great Again!_

clean_body: America has fallen. | | | | Friend, You’re our country’s only hope. If the current Democrat regime can get away with threatening to arrest its biggest political opponent, then our once great Republic will have fully descended into a third-world tyranny. But make no mistake: This isn’t about me. It’s about YOU. The regime wants to intimidate YOU out of voting for someone who is not beholden to the globalist ruling class. So, if you are angered by these threats toward me for having committed NO CRIME, I ask that you peacefully show your support for our America First movement. I don’t ask that you do it for me – I ask that you do it for yourself and your country. If America is to remain a free Republic, then we MUST show the Left that their intimidation tactics will NEVER stop the citizens of our country from choosing our own future. We will win the White House. We will obliterate the Deep State. We will once again put America first. And we will Make America Great Again! | - Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Jasmyn Jordan
subject: Leftists called me – a black female conservative – a WHITE SUPREMACIST
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451052:6axajnGNL:m:1:3331421248:72A31DA60AEADEB59B7BBBE18B134C58:r)
---
Peter, I'm a student at the University of Iowa. My peers in college called me a "white supremacist," "a token," "a bigot," and a "Nazi." Why? **Because I 'm a black conservative female who believes America is not a racist country.** When I was attacked by my university's Black Student Union for not buying into their leftist ideology, I thought I was alone. **But I found a conservative family at college through Young America 's Foundation (YAF), where I was finally surrounded by like-minded friends who love America, the constitution, and free enterprise.** YAF changed my life. And they need your help today. [**Would you consider giving a tax-deductible donation to Young America 's Foundation so they can change the lives of more students like me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451052:6axajnGNL:m:1:3331421248:72A31DA60AEADEB59B7BBBE18B134C58:r) My name is Jasmyn Jordan. You may have heard of Young America's Foundation before as the leading youth outreach organization in America. YAF inspires large student audiences in high schools and colleges with your conservative ideas. I'm proud to be the vice president of my YAF chapter at the University of Iowa. The Left on campus hates that I'm a conservative. But I'm proud to be, and so grateful to be a leader in YAF. YAF provides students with a nationwide campus lecture program, featuring prominent conservative leaders, including **Ben Shapiro** , **Kellyanne Conway** , **Matt Walsh** , **Dinesh D 'Souza**, **Larry Elder** , Dr. **Arthur Laffer** , **Katie Pavlich** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens** , and many others. You may have heard that Young America's Foundation as the organization that saved President Ronald Reagan's Ranch in Santa Barbara, California, and the Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois for future generations! YAF also provides young people with a "Schoolhouse for Reaganism," the Reagan Ranch Center, to teach students President Reagan's ideas and preserve his conservative legacy. In addition, **Young America 's Foundation leads the Conservative Movement teaching your conservative ideas on YouTube** with more than one million subscribers! YouTube is the #1 social media site used by young people. Through YouTube, YAF provides young Americans with full, impactful, feature-length conservative programs. [**Your tax-deductible donation to Young America 's Foundation could help minority students who have been taught to hate America and hate white people to instead embrace traditional American values.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451052:6axajnGNL:m:1:3331421248:72A31DA60AEADEB59B7BBBE18B134C58:r) Your tax-deductible donation will be changing the hearts and minds of students who desperately need an alternative viewpoint to the liberal ideology pushed on them in America's classrooms. [**Any amount you can give to YAF today -- will inspire young people to love (not hate) America and adopt your conservative viewpoint!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451052:6axajnGNL:m:1:3331421248:72A31DA60AEADEB59B7BBBE18B134C58:r) It's terrifying to see how a **hatred for America** has gripped my generation. **But I 'm living proof as a black conservative student that you can reach even the most impressionable students with your conservative values. ** Young America's Foundation is changing the tide and growing the Conservative Movement with new, young activists ready to dedicate their lives to freedom's cause. They need your help with this special mission. Thank you for helping Young America's Foundation today. And thank you for helping young Americans like me grow firm in our conservative values.
---
Gratefully,
---
Jasmyn Jordan Sophomore, University of Iowa

clean_body: | | | | Peter, I'm a student at the University of Iowa. My peers in college called me a "white supremacist," "a token," "a bigot," and a "Nazi." Why? Because I 'm a black conservative female who believes America is not a racist country. When I was attacked by my university's Black Student Union for not buying into their leftist ideology, I thought I was alone. But I found a conservative family at college through Young America 's Foundation (YAF), where I was finally surrounded by like-minded friends who love America, the constitution, and free enterprise. YAF changed my life. And they need your help today. My name is Jasmyn Jordan. You may have heard of Young America's Foundation before as the leading youth outreach organization in America. YAF inspires large student audiences in high schools and colleges with your conservative ideas. I'm proud to be the vice president of my YAF chapter at the University of Iowa. The Left on campus hates that I'm a conservative. But I'm proud to be, and so grateful to be a leader in YAF. YAF provides students with a nationwide campus lecture program, featuring prominent conservative leaders, including Ben Shapiro , Kellyanne Conway , Matt Walsh , Dinesh D 'Souza, Larry Elder , Dr. Arthur Laffer , Katie Pavlich , Lt. Col. Allen West , NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens , and many others. You may have heard that Young America's Foundation as the organization that saved President Ronald Reagan's Ranch in Santa Barbara, California, and the Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois for future generations! YAF also provides young people with a "Schoolhouse for Reaganism," the Reagan Ranch Center, to teach students President Reagan's ideas and preserve his conservative legacy. In addition, Young America 's Foundation leads the Conservative Movement teaching your conservative ideas on YouTube with more than one million subscribers! YouTube is the #1 social media site used by young people. Through YouTube, YAF provides young Americans with full, impactful, feature-length conservative programs. Your tax-deductible donation will be changing the hearts and minds of students who desperately need an alternative viewpoint to the liberal ideology pushed on them in America's classrooms. It's terrifying to see how a hatred for America has gripped my generation. But I 'm living proof as a black conservative student that you can reach even the most impressionable students with your conservative values. Young America's Foundation is changing the tide and growing the Conservative Movement with new, young activists ready to dedicate their lives to freedom's cause. They need your help with this special mission. Thank you for helping Young America's Foundation today. And thank you for helping young Americans like me grow firm in our conservative values. Still on the fence? Here are a few reasons to support Helen today:
**As a longtime community organizer,** Helen earned a national reputation (even before coming into elected office) defending communities from gentrification, expanding civil rights protections for immigrants, and leading a massive movement for public education during a state takeover of the Philadelphia public schools.
**As a City Councilmember,** Helen led one of the most robust anti-poverty, human rights agendas in the nation — bringing more resources to our public schools, helping end poverty-based evictions, establishing historic new labor laws for workers, and she remains one of the city’s most active and tireless champions for everyday Philadelphians like you and me.
**As a mom and former public school teacher,** Helen won’t stop fighting for our young people and ensuring that this city invests in their boundless potential. Whether she’s mentoring young people in her office, rallying with youth climate justice organizers, or taking on Harrisburg for failing to fund its schools, Helen uses the power of her voice and office to make change.
In the poorest large city in the nation, poverty and inequality on this scale doesn’t happen by accident. That’s why Helen is leading a massive movement to build a municipal agenda that’s inspiring the country.
We can’t rest until every child has a quality public school in their neighborhood, until working Philadelphians have the labor protections they need, until Black, Brown, immigrant and all communities feel they can live and prosper in our city, and until our economy and our environment is geared toward the future and not the past.
Helen’s work has exemplified our core value of centering Philadelphians in every decision, and as Mayor, she’ll continue to strive for a better Philly for all of us.
**Our team is a grassroots coalition across all neighborhoods of our city, but we’re up against a crowded field, career politicians, and wealthy opponents with deep pockets.[Can you pitch in anything right now to help fuel this work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60398061/397010288/1688789995?refcode=AU_HHG_FR_WEL_GEN_NTL_202303_SR3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmM1YjNhNy01Y2M2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Er1Fwl6AUKcYHcQRqykC9_LG__fcaZxmxxZwFUbdEzE=)**

clean_body: Join our base! | = Hey team — It’s Brendan McPhillips here, Helen’s campaign manager. Here’s the deal, I’m a proud Gritty-loving resident of Philly (go Birds), and I know that this city needs real leadership to truly reach its full potential. I had the honor of first serving as Helen’s campaign manager during her initial run for City Council in 2015. I believe in her because I’ve seen the results in action ever since, and she’s exactly the type of leader we need in our 100th mayor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Still on the fence? Here are a few reasons to support Helen today: As a longtime community organizer, Helen earned a national reputation (even before coming into elected office) defending communities from gentrification, expanding civil rights protections for immigrants, and leading a massive movement for public education during a state takeover of the Philadelphia public schools. As a City Councilmember, Helen led one of the most robust anti-poverty, human rights agendas in the nation — bringing more resources to our public schools, helping end poverty-based evictions, establishing historic new labor laws for workers, and she remains one of the city’s most active and tireless champions for everyday Philadelphians like you and me. As a mom and former public school teacher, Helen won’t stop fighting for our young people and ensuring that this city invests in their boundless potential. Whether she’s mentoring young people in her office, rallying with youth climate justice organizers, or taking on Harrisburg for failing to fund its schools, Helen uses the power of her voice and office to make change. In the poorest large city in the nation, poverty and inequality on this scale doesn’t happen by accident. That’s why Helen is leading a massive movement to build a municipal agenda that’s inspiring the country. We can’t rest until every child has a quality public school in their neighborhood, until working Philadelphians have the labor protections they need, until Black, Brown, immigrant and all communities feel they can live and prosper in our city, and until our economy and our environment is geared toward the future and not the past. Helen’s work has exemplified our core value of centering Philadelphians in every decision, and as Mayor, she’ll continue to strive for a better Philly for all of us. Our team is a grassroots coalition across all neighborhoods of our city, but we’re up against a crowded field, career politicians, and wealthy opponents with deep pockets.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you team, Brendan McPhillips Campaign Manager Helen Gym for Mayor Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: I spoke with Majority Leader Scalise and we agreed this is an emergency!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I am heartbroken to say we came up short of our FINAL mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the quarter (our first FEC deadline of the new Congress). We missed our goal by $4,937...

**I spoke with Majority Leader Scalise and we agreed this is an emergency for House Republicans.** _**[Luckily, we were able to reach you with enough time for ONE LAST PUSH to fix it.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450445:6Cz1NnGjN:m:1:3391001263:882AD6BCFDD28E814520923F06FDB052:r "Luckily, we were
able to reach you with enough time for ONE LAST PUSH to fix it.")**_

But if you sit on the sidelines, the results won't be pretty.

If we lose any more ground in the fundraising race, we will almost certainly lose our fragile House Majority to the Democrats. A Liberal Super PAC is already pledging an EIGHT-FIGURE investment to win enough races for Democrats to take back control of our Majority.

_**[Don't let that nightmare become a reality - chip in right away to help us close the budget gap and save the day!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450445:6Cz1NnGjN:m:1:3391001263:882AD6BCFDD28E814520923F06FDB052:r "Don’t let

**LAST YEAR,** Trump’s Republicans overturned Roe v. Wade and ENDED 50 years of precedent that gave the constitutional right to an abortion.

**NOW,** abortion is illegal for millions across the nation. Republicans in some states passed instantaneous legislation that outlawed reproductive care._****_

As of 2pm, I still need 982 more donations to help put a Democrat on the Wisconsin state Supreme Court. [_**So please, Peter: Can you rush $15 to me and WisDems so we can beat MAGA extremism at the ballot box? I wouldn’t ask if winning this Supreme Court seat wasn’t absolutely crucial >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60424971/397060490/-300295681?refcode=20230319_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_op_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDRjYjUwZi04NGM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=05SvbOjFpocaAw-ESm1efBr-SrnyYV3DWlOwK1vcBrY=)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Finding Faith
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450216:Jl3SQnGlN:m:1:3391001263:96D3F72DACA1392572705CF52A4792B4:r)
---

Like a lot of people, I grew up going to church and had a relationship with God that wasn't especially strong. But as I grew older that changed.

When I started my time at the United States Military Academy, two young men invited me to a Bible study.

They were very intentional to me in explaining God's Word. After some study and discipleship with them, they helped me begin my walk with Christ.

**Since then, faith has been central to my life.** I keep a Bible open on my desk, and read every morning from the Good Book.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450216:Jl3SQnGlN:m:1:3391001263:96D3F72DACA1392572705CF52A4792B4:r)
---

Like you, I am also confronted with a highly complex set of problems, and I need the wisdom to try and make the right calls. _**So I need my mind renewed with the truth of the Gospel each day.**_

Unfortunately, faith-driven judgments are few and far between in Washington. Our leaders act without moral clarity and the consequences have been devastating.

If we are to restore honesty, integrity, and morality to our government, __**[we must elect more faith-driven leaders.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450216:Jl3SQnGlN:m:1:3391001263:96D3F72DACA1392572705CF52A4792B4:r "we must elect more faith-driven leaders.")**__

---

---

We are less than a week away from the upcoming midterm elections, so it is critical we have the resources to elect more faith-driven leaders who love America. Time is of the essence!

If you agree, _**[please consider donating today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62450216:Jl3SQnGlN:m:1:3391001263:96D3F72DACA1392572705CF52A4792B4:r "please
consider donating today")**_ to support Christian conservatives who will let God be their guide - _**not self-interest**_.

God Bless,

**Attorney General Jason Miyares announced this week that his office has secured new, state-of-the-art Ballistics technology for ten**[**Project Ceasefire**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=37d48cc31643401387af0683e5f6d135&_e=udOyUIDBAPvnXBHS5ZMzxRqmyNlKdfdSERlY1k_XQYI3CO6YygSwzhSOMEsieXNITXQXe0NYM7mIkbtmeCECERqIVpaM9WTQ0ICIxn9kfxG_KTx2mGiv-EzST7rVgQf2Cy8hGJtX6rDgSsO_s7kQyz5mkTmM5NerbkjfC7vFIiqqE9-43MSx10S-DC9PMFgNhHSoJfCP0Ep5Sewed_acx6yHvP1osKDGGKNhY-g6MTSPZr6jzNmyv7XS2_NcHOnIuTg-An-Ii6DbGtiui4mWI1aEbF9wY2mACpwl6xkcNHCsMvMds_DbHQzEvdWpFRJn)**and nearby cities. Ballistics IQ is a ballistics triage tool that gives law enforcement the ability to quickly establish leads based on cartridge casing identifiers. ** _**_Agreements have been finalized with the following cities:_**_
* **Newport News**
* **Henrico**
* **Chesapeake**
* **Virginia Commonwealth University Police Department **
* **Petersburg**
* **Hanover**
* **Norfolk**
* **Richmond**
* **Virginia Beach**
* **Hopewell**

_“I’m thrilled that we were able to secure funding, reach agreements, purchase, and deliver this game changing technology to ten Virginia cities. Ballistics IQ is a proven tool that helps law enforcement get critical information faster, making their jobs easier. We’re hopeful that tools like this will help reduce crime in our communities.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares** **__Advantages of Ballistics IQ include:__**
* **The probable cause standard if met in minutes instead of waiting for hours or days **
* **The BIQ machine has a 2-4 minute identification process**
* **It can identify thousands of casings created by 3D printer switches**
* **Training is uncomplicated, and multiple people can be trained at the same agency**
* **The unit is mobile**
* **It can compare known samples among seven city departments **

---
| | **Ruff Day at the Office**
---
---
---
**_Did you know that Virginia was the first state to create an Animal Law Unit?_**
---
---
**Virginia’s groundbreaking Animal Law Unit dedicates their careers to prosecuting those who abuse or neglect animals. Director of the Animal Law Unit, Senior Assistant Attorney General Michelle Welch, is called on by agencies in every corner of the Commonwealth to act as a special prosecutor in animal cruelty and animal fighting cases. **
---
---
**We are so proud of the selfless work our Animal Law Unit does every day! **
---
| | **AG Miyares Secures Seven Indictments of Unemployment Compensation Fraud **
---
---
| | This week, Attorney General Miyares announced that the Unemployment Compensation Fraud Unit at the Office of the Attorney General produced seven sets of indictments. This is the third set of unemployment compensation fraud indictments secured by AG Miyares’ team. Last March, AG Miyares was asked by the Virginia Employment Commission to help prosecute fraudulent claims for unemployment compensation.
---
**Advocating for Virginia Workers**

**AG Miyares was honored to visit the Uyghur Islamic Center in Fairfax, America’s only Uyghur mosque. **

**_The Chinese Communist Party’s brutal oppression of their families is unconscionable. Attorney General Miyares is glad that Virginia has become a safe asylum for so many Uyghurs seeking religious freedom. _**

Ballistics IQ is a ballistics triage tool that gives law enforcement the ability to quickly establish leads based on cartridge casing identifiers. Agreements have been finalized with the following cities: Newport News Henrico Chesapeake Virginia Commonwealth University Police Department Petersburg Hanover Norfolk Richmond Virginia Beach Hopewell “I’m thrilled that we were able to secure funding, reach agreements, purchase, and deliver this game changing technology to ten Virginia cities. Ballistics IQ is a proven tool that helps law enforcement get critical information faster, making their jobs easier. We’re hopeful that tools like this will help reduce crime in our communities.” – Attorney General Miyares Advantages of Ballistics IQ include: The probable cause standard if met in minutes instead of waiting for hours or days The BIQ machine has a 2-4 minute identification process It can identify thousands of casings created by 3D printer switches Training is uncomplicated, and multiple people can be trained at the same agency The unit is mobile It can compare known samples among seven city departments | | Ruff Day at the Office Did you know that Virginia was the first state to create an Animal Law Unit? name: Accountable Tech via Blue Amp Action
subject: [Ask them to stop tracking us] Google knows if you’re seeking reproductive health care
body:
Quick petition
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbccd1299-496b-4968-8e24-e4208a0df7f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, 24 states have banned abortion or are likely to do so in the coming months.[1] Hundreds of thousands of Americans seek an abortion every year. Our research found that Google still retains location search queries for reproductive care facilities – despite promising otherwise. This is a HUGE problem: Right-wing state governments are increasingly seeking to prosecute people seeking abortions – and even private citizens can sue anyone who aids and abets abortion seekers in states like Oklahoma or Texas. [2] **[Peter, will you join us in calling on Google to protect users’ privacy and delete users’ location data that state governments and private citizens could use to prosecute those seeking reproductive health care →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T55e29219-b51d-4589-b1a7-14a727b8f38c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f2809ba-4b5a-4b07-9646-98ffae4b62a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks to previous pressure we put on Google last year, they updated their policy to automatically delete the location data of visits to "particularly personal" locations like counseling centers, domestic violence shelters, abortion clinics, fertility centers, addiction treatment facilities, weight loss clinics, cosmetic surgery clinics, and others.

However, our own research shows that this data is STILL being stored despite Google’s promises, and it could be weaponized by anti-abortion prosecutors and state agents. Reporting from December concluded that location history data related to visiting abortion clinics was stored by Google for months, despite their promises to automatically delete that sensitive data. **[This is unacceptable. Join us in calling on Google to uphold its promise and ADD YOUR NAME to demand Google stop collecting and retaining location data from users.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8e4d0aa6-6e3b-40ef-9416-8c7d53dae803/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks for taking action with us to hold Google accountable, – The Team at Accountable Tech [1] Guttmatcher Institute: [https://www.guttmacher.org/2023/01/six-months-post-roe-24-us-states-have-banned-abortion-or-are-likely-do-so-roundup](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta6460a50-639a-4c24-b6ff-edbcac674523/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [2] CNN: [https://www.cnn.com/2022/04/28/politics/oklahoma-heartbeat-act/index.html](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ba6babd-1982-4216-a5de-75682718f638/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3a21d85-06d3-4c8a-a8f1-a18e4331abb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/googlemustdeletelocationdata2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T607ea6a7-9000-4702-8370-528bd05a08b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter Willis,

of consistently aligning with conservative outlets and organizations.

He smoothed over his endorsement from Republican billionaire Ken Griffin

comments attacking Democrats, and comments attacking the city of Chicago.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you add your name to our petition calling on Congress to pass universal background checks?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Universal background checks legislation will be most effective if it’s passed by Congress at the federal level.
#

Friends -
This past week, we were proud to stand with President Biden as he unveiled a series of gun safety executive actions, including steps towards achieving universal background checks in our country.
However, universal background checks legislation will be most effective if it’s passed by Congress at the federal level.
Last year, Congress showed that they had the courage to act by passing the most transformative gun safety legislation package in nearly 30 years. But we still are waiting for them to take action and pass universal background checks.
Saving lives from senseless acts of gun violence starts with making sure people who should not be allowed to have guns aren’t able to buy them.
The only place this idea is controversial is Congress.
[**So we’re asking today if you’ll add your name to our petition calling on Congress to pass universal background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230319-1-15&refcode2=4442.3935704.ucTLRA&akid=4442%2E3935704%2EucTLRA)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230319-1-15&refcode2=4442.3935704.ucTLRA&akid=4442%2E3935704%2EucTLRA)**
Passing universal background checks is a simple action, but it speaks volumes about the size of the movement to change our gun laws.
That’s why we must keep the pressure on and let our elected officials in Congress know that we’re not backing down in our demands to pass universal background checks.
[**Please, use this link to say you want Congress to pass universal background checks for gun purchases in the United States.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230319-1-15&refcode2=4442.3935704.ucTLRA&akid=4442%2E3935704%2EucTLRA)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_ubcpetition_mar23/?source=em230319-1-15&refcode2=4442.3935704.ucTLRA&akid=4442%2E3935704%2EucTLRA)**
Thank you for standing with us,
The Giffords Team

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4442%2E3935704%2EucTLRA) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: My commitment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter,
When I launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, I knew I had to do it the right way — without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $10 or whatever you can before our major FEC deadline later this month.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29273?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) But will you please give me just a moment to explain why that commitment is so important to me?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29273?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod)**
For decades, massive corporations have turned the struggles of real everyday people into their own personal profit. Whether it’s wasting trillions of dollars on pointless forever wars or price-gouging medication millions of Americans need for survival — they’ve waged economic warfare on our country.
**And thanks to an army of lobbyists and millions in corporate PAC donations, the politicians who are supposed to protect us let them get away with it.**
These politicians will take money and buy stock from Big Pharma, fossil fuels, defense contractors, and so many other industries that have spent years tearing up our country. And once they’re elected, that’s who they’ll work for in Congress.
We’ve watched it happen over and over. Instead of fighting for the people, corrupt DC politicians like Josh Hawley have auctioned their votes off to the highest bidder while the rest of us get left behind. **I’m running to break that cycle.**
The only way we’ll be able to fight back and fundamentally change who has power in our country is by building an unprecedented grassroots movement here in Missouri — and with $0 from corporate PACs + $0 from federal lobbyists, we’re already on our way to making it happen.
**Thanks to support from real people just like you, we’re throwing out the rulebook and running this campaign the right way** — staying focused on calling out Hawley for being a fraud and a coward instead of pleasing a bunch of corporate elites. And our message is resonating, but we can’t slow down now.
The NRSC has already proved our race is a top target in 2024, and they’ll spend whatever it takes to keep Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. **That’s why I’m asking:**
**[Will you add your first donation of $10 or more to my grassroots campaign today? Your early support will help us get our message in front of voters, stand up to the national Republicans backing Josh Hawley, and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29273?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29274?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29274?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29274?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29274?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29274?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29274?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29273?refcode=em20230319-2870&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod)
---
I’m glad to have you on my team, Peter.
Let’s do this,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230319-2870-footer&t=11&refcode2=2870_614464_55OIod&akid=2870%2E614464%2E55OIod)**

Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
this headline from The Intercept?

[1]The Intercept: CENTRIST DEMOCRATIC PAC’S SOLE FUNDER IS A REPUBLICAN
MEGADONOR

A GOP mega-donor and 🤑billionaire🤑 gave Moderate PAC $1,000,000 to stop us
from recruiting the next slate of progressive primary challengers like
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Summer Lee. 😱

🚨 Peter, we need
your immediate help to fight back against Moderate PAC and their GOP
mega-donor.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131632?refcode=em20230319-28055&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to help us be
prepared for what we know is coming this cycle — an onslaught of attacks
and millions spent against us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131632?refcode=em20230319-28055&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr ]Contribute $3

Moderate PAC is coming after us because they’re threatened by our success.
We recruited and helped elect AOC, Summer Lee, Cori Bush, and Jamaal
Bowman and in just a few short years have completely shifted the
conversation about what’s politically possible in Washington.

But Moderate PAC plans to raise and spend $20 million against us and our
candidates. Because our own fundraising has been steadily declining over
the last year, we’re counting on you to help us counter this obscene
amount of money they’re spending against us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131632?refcode=em20230319-28055&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr ]We will never stop fighting for a Democratic Party that actually works
for 99%, not corporations. Please make your best gift right now. We will
always use your contribution in the most effective way possible.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230319-28055-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28055_1203867_pXRJRr&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28055%2E1203867%2EpXRJRr

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Knoxville, TN 37932

# Statement from Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt on Local CompassCare Criminal Incident
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00174l5go_HVUk3Hs3Q0TdtmwL-iVAfo0OzWwl2q8zKRLzpNqXPWdOelz6M4ljJrqZgK7480q_uWjWXq9zABABm_VPd4AWW8RHmV3hDpqsPhm0SSg1oH5L0wZ5I9XiJEsX5qDBm5-E8M_yT_y5SEtbMJRv7TV37ICWJO5khPBOvXZxwmCe_OjdtNbCspWYegFEtPVRrCNY-aTa5O2O5Fl9k7KY_rfystl85&c=BsFby4x2X_g24-tILDwDsHvpKnEA3yvbSlm4tts8AFSWweRxzMWyjQ==&ch=XcvWjHnll24KgcaanlMVfM8L0nXPAxw0F8muvfnT1hizz2IaaP6VNw==)
---
It is maddening to learn that early Thursday morning, there was yet another criminal incident at CompassCare in Amherst. Last summer, CompassCare was firebombed, leaving the building destroyed. At that time, I [called](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00174l5go_HVUk3Hs3Q0TdtmwL-iVAfo0OzWwl2q8zKRLzpNqXPWdOelz6M4ljJrqZgjokBMDHRHP8LmSk6qeSdKX15Eo0Mn0ZBHGbuPtcO2SgKdRuWcisUQ2_YCEGM-wolYS4DmX1bytXKXXVf7zf66_BHiKmemTSA6k7VEy9UKow_Y6sMN0vAkeeT5Dwjrgs7k_xpljshazvxCRJ82jXLapyfMt1CWIeJExmRE027fClc__Y_qYzFzBTaXe9-CuBRjdWaya3md64G4bt_XHDNIw==&c=BsFby4x2X_g24-tILDwDsHvpKnEA3yvbSlm4tts8AFSWweRxzMWyjQ==&ch=XcvWjHnll24KgcaanlMVfM8L0nXPAxw0F8muvfnT1hizz2IaaP6VNw==) on Governor Hochul to use her resources, including the New York State Police, to investigate this violent incident and provide the same level of security that other women's health clinics receive - and ought to receive - in this state. The Governor, unfortunately, ignored my request, and here we are again.
This morning, I repeat my calls for the Governor to utilize all resources at her disposal, including the State Police, to investigate this incident and hold the perpetrators responsible. Any criminal act against a women's health facility, whether pro-life or pro-choice, is intolerable and must be treated with the utmost seriousness.

New York Post \- NYGOP urges Hochul to get 'bloody' on bail reform fix in budget battle with fellow Dems

The Democratic supermajorities in the state Senate and Assembly [rejected her proposal to loosen bail laws](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00174l5go_HVUk3Hs3Q0TdtmwL-iVAfo0OzWwl2q8zKRLzpNqXPWdOelz6M4ljJrqZgdzk7p60LDnLjWEgEcsTDp2Wa1U-CkUoEXCdt6NvvqqaOj_TOgaE8aggDiC_TQHWHOV58vPWtYT-_Zm4jrbnrB69aLKHGAcxx7V1B1ImpF3oG-73f7eqlQ9JcbqE_ttnDIc5T60EEFMh4XLPdzBbSoFA1ePtL8WDQnoz0YBZ8gW1J-FY7JK2xaBqPcKvA3RVIhgMeRdSqUsl6EMZ_k9exsA==&c=BsFby4x2X_g24-tILDwDsHvpKnEA3yvbSlm4tts8AFSWweRxzMWyjQ==&ch=XcvWjHnll24KgcaanlMVfM8L0nXPAxw0F8muvfnT1hizz2IaaP6VNw==) to make it easier for judges to impose cash bail on criminal defendants accused of serious offenses.
"She knew this would be a bloody point in negotiations," state Senate Minority Leader Robert Ortt (R-Lockport) told reporters Wednesday following a recent meeting with Hochul.
The video player is currently playing an ad. You can skip the ad in 5 sec with a mouse or keyboard

"I'm gonna hold her to her word at this point that she needs to lean in. If she doesn't - no one else is fighting for victims out there."

Controversial reforms passed in 2019 require judges to give defendants the "least restrictive conditions" ahead of their trials even when the offense would otherwise allow cash bail - an ambiguity that Hochul says must be resolved this year amid rising crime.

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)
**Just making sure you saw Ilhan's note from earlier this week.**
**We've set some ambitious fundraising goals for this month's official FEC deadline, because it's critically important that we send a powerful message about our campaign's strength.**
**[So please: Take a look at Ilhan's message below, and then make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with our movement today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=2&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=3&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)**
* * *
Friends -
I'm writing today to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign, but before I do, please give me a chance to explain why.
Here's the deal:
March is an especially important month for our campaign, and a big reason for that is our official FEC fundraising deadline at the end of it.
Once that deadline passes, we're legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers for the year so far. The amount we've raised, how many contributions make up that amount — everything will be available for all to see. Good or bad, no matter what.
I can guarantee you that once that report is filed, our opponents — like right-wing Republican lobbyists and dark money super PACs — will be pouring through the receipts to see how we did.
The truth is, they want to know if our campaign has the resources necessary to fight back against them or not.
They want to know if it's worth pouring millions upon millions of dollars into Minnesota this election cycle to try and defeat us.
**_They want to know if there's blood in the water — that means our job is to show that our movement stands stronger than ever.**_
We don't want our opponents to like what they see when we file our FEC report, but the only way we can make sure that happens is if we're in this together. What do you say?
**[Can you make your first online $3 contribution to stand with our campaign today? Every donation — no matter how big or small — will show everyone the unmistakable strength of our movement for justice.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=4&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)**
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/14?c0=io-em-march23.NFCjOS&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=23&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)

[Express Donate: $15](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/772?c0=io-em-march23.jvEbQE&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=25&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-march23.RtteqN&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=26&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-march23.G2siDR&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=27&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)
[Or, donate another amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-march23.S0C1tq&refcode=em230318-ak-g-act&t=28&akid=26%2E791427%2EpSckTM)
I'm incredibly proud of the way we fund this campaign. No corporate PACs, just lots and lots of people standing together and chipping in what they can.
I hope you're proud of that too.
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

body:
Let me explain why we all need to pitch in and help Judge Janet | Hey there, folks, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to consider supporting a candidate for Wisconsin Supreme Court. But first, let me explain this race: _POLITICO_ called it _"the most important election nobody’s ever heard of"_ _**and it matters for anyone who wants to protect reproductive rights and stop far-right extremists from overturning our elections in the future.**_ Judge Janet Protasiewicz is the official Democratic Nominee for a 10-year term on the WI Supreme Court tied 3-3 between conservatives and progressives. _**Wisconsin's Supreme Court barely accepted the results of the 2020 election. If Judge Janet's opponent were on the bench, they would've undemocratically handed this swing state to Donald Trump.**_ [**Friend, we could see a repeat of the same claims of election fraud in 2024, and I don't want that decision to fall to Judge Janet's far-right opponent. Peter \-- we’ll be frank with you.
Never in our wildest dreams did we think Raja would become a Congressman.
But we know that this extraordinary job comes with many challenges.
Between fighting against those who threaten our democracy to ensuring that people aren’t left behind by unfair systems, our son is doing so much for each and every one of us.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: don’t want to think about this right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Our February fundraising was slow enough that we had to reduce the amount we expect to raise in March.
| | |
---
I wish I had better news, but unfortunately I don’t:

Our February fundraising was slow enough that we had to reduce the amount we expect to raise in March.

This would be problematic under ordinary circumstances but, because my campaign took on debt in order to win, this is especially concerning. _We haven’t even closed the books on 2022 yet._
**[I hope that I can count on you to get us out of this hole. My team ran the math and if you made a $3 contribution RIGHT NOW, it would help get our numbers back on track. Will you please help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60414892/397040952/-1829049351?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2234-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTA1YWQxNi02ZmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BUWT1fZ-vq-PzdOqIZ5MxYOd4OU5q-3gja_KtH0OMtc=)**

I know that it’s March and that lots of folks don’t want to be thinking about elections right now – I don’t want to be either. But until my campaign retires this debt, it’s something I’ve got to focus on.

The good news is, the more people who step up and donate to this email, the more likely it is that we can finish paying down what we owe quickly. That’s why I need your help.

Maggie Hassan
