name: Sen. Sherrod Brown (via Democrats.org)
subject: I’m running for reelection, and I need your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC, but before I do, I wanted to take a second to explain why I need your support. | |
---
Hi Derek -- Senator Sherrod Brown here. Growing up in Ohio, I was brought up in a community of autoworkers, ironworkers, carpenters, and electricians. I spent my summers working on my family’s farm, learning from the working people who have shaped me into the person I am today. They’re the reason why I fight for the dignity of work -- because no matter what kind of work you do, it should pay off. I’ve battled against broken policies that put corporate profits ahead of workers and families, long championed voting rights as the former Ohio Secretary of State, and pushed for lowering health care costs for seniors and growing families. At the end of the day, it comes down to this, Derek: I’ve spent my life fighting for working people and families across America. We still have more to do, so I’m running for reelection in 2024. **Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today? As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, the battle for the Senate majority could come down to my race -- and I’m asking you to help me continue fighting for working people across the country.**

** ** **** ** While 2024 seems like a long way away, getting ready early could be the deciding factor on how I do next November. clean_body: In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC, but before I do, I wanted to take a second to explain why I need your support. | | Hi Derek -- Senator Sherrod Brown here. Growing up in Ohio, I was brought up in a community of autoworkers, ironworkers, carpenters, and electricians. I spent my summers working on my family’s farm, learning from the working people who have shaped me into the person I am today. They’re the reason why I fight for the dignity of work -- because no matter what kind of work you do, it should pay off. I’ve battled against broken policies that put corporate profits ahead of workers and families, long championed voting rights as the former Ohio Secretary of State, and pushed for lowering health care costs for seniors and growing families. At the end of the day, it comes down to this, Derek: I’ve spent my life fighting for working people and families across America. We still have more to do, so I’m running for reelection in 2024. Will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the DNC today? As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, the battle for the Senate majority could come down to my race -- and I’m asking you to help me continue fighting for working people across the country. While 2024 seems like a long way away, getting ready early could be the deciding factor on how I do next November. It’s early donations that make all the difference in elections, it’s how we build the foundation needed to win -- especially since this could be my toughest race yet. Thank you for standing with me, Sherrod Sherrod Brown U.S. Senator, Ohio The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving the series. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: SIGNATURE NEEDED: DC Statehood. NOW.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcYx~63Q~/Ym4wVHFPMHdPTEpKOVFQWW0rMUR5MXh2c0VlbHIvV0Y4UGJuWnpnRHVQL2h4Sjl6dHhtbndUYjk2bWJHcGV1a3RBOXVIWmpLWjZyUnZoR0hDZkJDeHdOQ0lOOEJrZ1hGRjlDVENHbkJ0WEk9S0/V0c3YS80YVFrVi9ZL2M0UEdLdTJTdGxGTWZmRVJOZ0I1RzZTelV5NVNtQ1phNW5OditMUGRNTzExNDBtNDlaSGZLa1JTMDhXNWcveXBwOWhsK2svbnV4VGdNRFB5WTFKS0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9306655&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQ1NTQ4MAS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQ1NTQ4MAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9306655&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQ1NTQ4MAS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQ1NTQ4MAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/G8bxcgvmx-Sb/Ym4wVHFPMHdPTEpKOVFQWW0rMUR5MXh2c0VlbHIvV0Y4UGJuWnpnRHVQL2h4Sjl6dHhtbndUYjk2bWJHcGV1a3RBOXVIWmpLWjZyUnZoR0hDZkJDeHdOQ0lOOEJrZ1hGRjlDVENHbkJ0WEk9S0/V0c3YS80YVFrVi9ZL2M0UEdLdTJTdGxGTWZmRVJOZ0I1RzZTelV5NVNtQ1phNW5OditMUGRNTzExNDBtNDlaSGZLa1JTMDhXNWcveXBwOWhsK2svbnV4VGdNRFB5WTFKS0 ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_4Ed9HG/Ym4wVHFPMHdPTEpKOVFQWW0rMUR5MXh2c0VlbHIvV0Y4UGJuWnpnRHVQL2h4Sjl6dHhtbndUYjk2bWJHcGV1a3RBOXVIWmpLWjZyUnZoR0hDZkJDeHdOQ0lOOEJrZ1hGRjlDVENHbkJ0WEk9S0/

name: Read/Act News
subject: Canceling Twain
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.-_Jtl1NtTirRY4g)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](http://trk.readactnews.) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://trk.readactnews._pY5pmOjrg).
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.-w)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift-before they're gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **"Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories"** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://trk.readactnews.-HHiBaKLHtBXXPdfOM8Q) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, "All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ " Don't let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **"Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories" **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---

subject: Ron DeSantis wants Florida to be a model for GOP rule
body:
That’s why we have to be prepared to fire on all cylinders | | |

| | **Last week Ron DeSantis hit the campaign trail in Iowa – signaling he plans to announce his run for president _any day now._** But as governor of Florida, Ron DeSantis has signed into law anti-abortion, anti-LGBTQ+, and anti-democracy legislation – and if given the power of the Oval Office, he could make that a reality for all of America. **DeSantis and his state Republican allies are trying to make Florida the blueprint for extremist states across the country. We want to know what our supporters think, so can you take our poll today?** | **How do you feel about Ron DeSantis running for President in 2024?**

name: Speaker Kevin McCarthy
subject: heartbroken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I am heartbroken to say we came up short of our FINAL mid-month fundraising goal before the end of the quarter (our first FEC deadline of the new Congress). We missed our goal by $4,937...

**I spoke with Majority Leader Scalise and we agreed this is an emergency for House Republicans.** _**[Luckily, we were able to reach you with enough time for ONE LAST PUSH to fix it.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451494:JKCV6nGN9:m:1:3331421248:531A22483FBA3A8D8E43DE6A26565B36:r "Luckily, we were able to reach you with enough time for ONE LAST PUSH to fix it.")**_

But if you sit on the sidelines, the results won't be pretty.

If we lose any more ground in the fundraising race, we will almost certainly lose our fragile House Majority to the Democrats. A Liberal Super PAC is already pledging an EIGHT-FIGURE investment to win enough races for Democrats to take back control of our Majority.

_**[Don't let that nightmare become a reality - chip in right away to help us close the budget gap and save the day!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62451494:JKCV6nGN9:m:1:3331421248:531A22483FBA3A8D8E43DE6A26565B36:r "Don’t let
that nightmare become a reality – chip in right away to help us close the budget gap and save the day!")**_
---

name: Sara (personal)
subject: We need to take back the House in 2024. Are you in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230319_em_sjj_majority [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230319_em_sjj_majority]
Friends - we have a lot of important things moving in the House this month, and like with so much of what we want to accomplish, we’re facing an uphill battle against Republican opposition.
That makes it even more crucial that we not only push as hard as we can on meaningful legislation right now, but also have our eyes set on retaking the House in 2024. Our shared priorities depend on it.
So here’s the one ask I have for you today: Are you all in to help Democrats regain the majority in the House in 2024? Click through to say you’re on board, then keep reading for a snapshot of my March priorities. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2]
Here’s some of what is top of mind for me:
Fighting back against trans hate. Advancing equality for members of the trans community is not only a professional obligation, it’s also personal as the sister of a trans brother and a gender-nonconforming sibling. In my role as Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus and co-chair of the Transgender Equality Task Force with Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal, I’m fired up to dig into this work and remind Republicans that trans people exist and they deserve respect and dignity.
March 31 is Trans Day of Visibility, which is such an important day to show our support for the community, especially after the last few weeks of particularly horrific rhetoric and legislation targeting them.
Expanding the social safety net. From finding solutions to the nationwide child care crisis to ensuring access to essential health care and housing that’s affordable, I’m committed to addressing these issues right now. I’m proud to be co-leading the Child Care for Every Community Act, which will guarantee child care that is affordable for every family and support our child care providers who are doing such important work.
These are just a couple of the issues that I’m focused on right now - and amid all of this important work, I’m also very aware of the fact that if we want to make real progress, we also need to focus on electoral gains in the coming year.
There are a whole host of extremists and right-wingers who are pushing to flip seats in 2024, and honestly, we ignore them at our own peril. There’s just too much on the line for our families and our communities. So today, I’m asking you to commit to doing whatever you can to help regain a Democratic House majority in 2024. Will you sign on today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2]
I'M COMMITTED 👉 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/j6dNgia5PUml7cwOFRgGQA2]
Thanks for standing with me.
-Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

clean_body: [] Friends - we have a lot of important things moving in the House this month, and like with so much of what we want to accomplish, we’re facing an uphill battle against Republican opposition. That makes it even more crucial that we not only push as hard as we can on meaningful legislation right now, but also have our eyes set on retaking the House in 2024. Our shared priorities depend on it. So here’s the one ask I have for you today: Are you all in to help Democrats regain the majority in the House in 2024? Click through to say you’re on board, then keep reading for a snapshot of my March priorities. [] Here’s some of what is top of mind for me: Fighting back against trans hate. Advancing equality for members of the trans community is not only a professional obligation, it’s also personal as the sister of a trans brother and a gender-nonconforming sibling. In my role as Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus and co-chair of the Transgender Equality Task Force with Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal, I’m fired up to dig into this work and remind Republicans that trans people exist and they deserve respect and dignity. March 31 is Trans Day of Visibility, which is such an important day to show our support for the community, especially after the last few weeks of particularly horrific rhetoric and legislation targeting them. Expanding the social safety net. From finding solutions to the nationwide child care crisis to ensuring access to essential health care and housing that’s affordable, I’m committed to addressing these issues right now. I’m proud to be co-leading the Child Care for Every Community Act, which will guarantee child care that is affordable for every family and support our child care providers who are doing such important work. These are just a couple of the issues that I’m focused on right now - and amid all of this important work, I’m also very aware of the fact that if we want to make real progress, we also need to focus on electoral gains in the coming year. There are a whole host of extremists and right-wingers who are pushing to flip seats in 2024, and honestly, we ignore them at our own peril. There’s just too much on the line for our families and our communities. So today, I’m asking you to commit to doing whatever you can to help regain a Democratic House majority in 2024. Will you sign on today? [] I'M COMMITTED 👉 [] Thanks for standing with me. -Sara Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District CONTRIBUTE [] [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States [] [] [] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [] and we'll adjust your preferences. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats' pro-criminal agenda
body:
The 2023 legislative session continues with Democrats still refusing to reform the failed - and deadly - pro-criminal bill that they passed in 2021. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61612741:sILOJdD8N:m:1:2610672541:C813513EF74D1A319E4FAE092308576A:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2023 legislative session continues with House Democrats still refusing to reform the failed - and deadly - pro-criminal no-pursuit law that they passed in 2021. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
State Senator Shelly Short (R - 7th LD) joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Representing a heavily agricultural area, Sen. Short gave her thoughts on Governor Jay Inslee's failure to follow the law and exempt farmers from the impact of the his expensive cap-and-trade policies. She also offered insights into the governor killing the bi-partisan effort to improve fish runs on agricultural lands. Among other topics, Sen. Short concluded by offering her views on reforming agriculture overtime laws and improving wildfire prevention methods. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61612742:sILOJdD8N:m:1:2610672541:C813513EF74D1A319E4FAE092308576A:r).

**This week 's top story...**
Democrats in the Washington State Legislature refuse to reform a law - jammed through on a party-line vote in 2021 - which is causing innocent people across our state to die. Adding insult to injury, Democrats are using a faulty study to claim that they are protecting innocent people from being harmed. Fixing the bill will all come down to the House Speaker Laurie Jinkins and her fellow Democrats as Senate Bill 5352 - an attempt to amend the failed 2021 law banning police pursuits - is now in the House awaiting her to allow it to be heard. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61612743:sILOJdD8N:m:1:2610672541:C813513EF74D1A319E4FAE092308576A:r).

**In case you missed it ... **
A rider using public transportation in Snohomish County claimed that his constitutional rights had been violated when he was asked to show his ticket, or proof of payment. His case went all the way up to the State Supreme Court which, substantially, agreed with him. The highest court in our state found that removing him from the public transportation he had not paid for was an illegal seizure. [**Read this story and more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61612744:sILOJdD8N:m:1:2610672541:C813513EF74D1A319E4FAE092308576A:r).

**Your inspiration for the week ...**
Democrats may be passing concerning policies - and not acting on other needed bills - but it's never a bad idea to sit back and enjoy the beauty of our state. This photo from the collection of former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler, features some of his Skagit Valley neighbors.
P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking [**here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61612745:sILOJdD8N:m:1:2610672541:C813513EF74D1A319E4FAE092308576A:r). | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61612746:sILOJdD8N:m:1:2610672541:C813513EF74D1A319E4FAE092308576A:r)

clean_body: The 2023 legislative session continues with Democrats still refusing to reform the failed - and deadly - pro-criminal bill that they passed in 2021. | | "Shift Washington" | Friends, The 2023 legislative session continues with House Democrats still refusing to reform the failed - and deadly - pro-criminal no-pursuit law that they passed in 2021. But as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on... This week 's Newsmaker Interview... State Senator Shelly Short (R - 7th LD) joined us for this week's Newsmaker Interview. Representing a heavily agricultural area, Sen. Short gave her thoughts on Governor Jay Inslee's failure to follow the law and exempt farmers from the impact of the his expensive cap-and-trade policies. She also offered insights into the governor killing the bi-partisan effort to improve fish runs on agricultural lands. Among other topics, Sen. Short concluded by offering her views on reforming agriculture overtime laws and improving wildfire prevention methods. . This week 's top story... Democrats in the Washington State Legislature refuse to reform a law - jammed through on a party-line vote in 2021 - which is causing innocent people across our state to die. Adding insult to injury, Democrats are using a faulty study to claim that they are protecting innocent people from being harmed. Fixing the bill will all come down to the House Speaker Laurie Jinkins and her fellow Democrats as Senate Bill 5352 - an attempt to amend the failed 2021 law banning police pursuits - is now in the House awaiting her to allow it to be heard. . In case you missed it ... A rider using public transportation in Snohomish County claimed that his constitutional rights had been violated when he was asked to show his ticket, or proof of payment. His case went all the way up to the State Supreme Court which, substantially, agreed with him. The highest court in our state found that removing him from the public transportation he had not paid for was an illegal seizure. . Your inspiration for the week ... Democrats may be passing concerning policies - and not acting on other needed bills - but it's never a bad idea to sit back and enjoy the beauty of our state. This photo from the collection of former U.S. Rep. Rod Chandler, features some of his Skagit Valley neighbors. P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by clicking . | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. name: Sign the Petition via Left Action
subject: Prosecute Republican Leaders Who Use Threats and Intimidation to Interfere in Trump Cases
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [If Republican Leaders Use Threats to Interfere in Trump Cases, Then Charge Them and Put Them in Jail>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e0cc9f4-7b4f-4f5e-86ec-c31457283268/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T471e7a78-219f-4c32-b09c-127c5b8dffeb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump is facing multiple cases at the federal and state levels, for a range of crimes. And Republican leaders in Congress and beyond are [blatantly interfering](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ed4dfdc-402a-4a6a-8e83-ed19e2b7fd39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) by using threats and intimidation to try to get prosecutors and other officials to drop these cases.

**And if they keep this up, they should go to jail.**

It's one thing to criticize a case or a prosecutor, or to defend Trump. But threats and intimidation are another thing altogether. And there are laws against that. And if people like [Kevin McCarthy and others want to use threats of any kind](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf369a41e-10f4-4ded-a2f1-adb8d69cded7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), or try to whip Trump's mob into a violent frenzy, they need to be charged, prosecuted, and put in jail.

**Those overseeing the Trump cases and making tough decisions have a hard enough job already, and shouldn't have to fear for their lives.**

[**Add your name, and demand that if these Republican leaders keep this up, they go where they belong — jail.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T108506dd-4f00-40ac-a9a8-f0c9feaf5b64/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team Cori
subject: Is your inbox about to be flooded?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We’re reaching out today for a reason.
#
Peter,
If you’re anything like us, you get emails like these ones from a few different political campaigns and non-profits. If that’s the case for you, too, then we want to make sure you know: The Federal Election Commission’s end-of-quarter fundraising filing deadline is coming up in just over 10 days from now.
This means your inbox is likely going to be flooded with even more emails than normal. Which is why we’re reaching out today — to (hopefully) beat the rush of emails that may be coming your way soon.
**Since Friday, March 31, is the first FEC deadline of the year, the number we report will be critical to how seriously our opponents take our movement.** If we report a low fundraising number for the quarter, then the GOP and corporate PACs who want to see us fail may decide to redirect more resources towards attacking Cori.
But if we have a strong showing on the report, the media pundits, right-wing extremists, and shady PACs will know that our movement is _strong_.
**[Please make your first donation of $5 before midnight on March 31 to help us demonstrate the true strength of our people-powered movement. Cori doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs, so we rely solely on donations from folks like you, Peter.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230319.EP7BK9&amount=5&refcode=em20230319-2357&t=1&akid=2357%2E1082990%2E-sK7mV)**
**[Rush $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230319.EP7BK9&amount=5&refcode=em20230319-2357&t=20&akid=2357%2E1082990%2E-sK7mV)**
We’ll keep you updated on our progress through the end of the quarter.
—Team Cori
P.S. Want to stay connected with Team Cori, but don’t want to receive as many emails? [**Click here to receive fewer emails from us — you’ll only get our most pressing messages.**](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=21&akid=2357%2E1082990%2E-sK7mV)

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230319?refcode=em20230319-2357-footer&t=22&refcode2=2357_1082990_-sK7mV&akid=2357%2E1082990%2E-sK7mV) **

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.

clean_body: We can’t let our despair overwhelm us | The Supreme Court officially overturned Roe v. Wade , eliminating national protection of the right to have an abortion. Peter, this news is devastating. But we can’t let our despair overwhelm us – we must fight back immediately to save reproductive rights. IF we don’t fight this ruling and push the Senate to codify Roe v. Wade , women across the country will be in grave danger. BUT IF we give this fight everything we have, we can push the Senate to pass a law guaranteeing reproductive rights to everyone in the country! | Let's make our voices heard! name: Jason Crow
subject: We have a choice to make
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:

#
---
Folks — the time for waiting is over. Wildfires are worsening. The Colorado River is drying up. Temperatures are increasing at an alarming rate. We’re seeing the effects of climate change firsthand — and it’s putting Colorado’s residents, economy, and fundamental way of life in jeopardy. **We have a choice to make: Will we carry on as usual, or will we face climate change head-on to protect the Colorado that we love?** I’ve made my choice — which is why I’m introducing the _Protect the West Act._ **[Senator Michael Bennet and I just introduced this bill to protect our environment before it is too late. Will help us pass the _Protect the West Act_ by becoming a citizen co-sponsor today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60422114/397053114/434499906?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230319_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230319_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDMwM2JiYy03OWM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdVly_bt1xugQcK7bWzBln2utklyO5pNcd7RZgiSUJg=&emci=cc303bbc-79c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cd303bbc-79c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=29801744)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60422115/397053115/434499906?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230319_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230319_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDMwM2JiYy03OWM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdVly_bt1xugQcK7bWzBln2utklyO5pNcd7RZgiSUJg=&emci=cc303bbc-79c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cd303bbc-79c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=29801744)
---
We need to take action to combat worsening wildfires and droughts across the West. That’s where the _Protect the West Act_ comes in.
If enacted, the _Protect the West Act_ will invest millions back into our forests and public lands. The legislation will help restore our forests, grasslands, and watersheds to protect the American West as we know it. It’ll also help create/sustain 2 million good-paying jobs and safeguard our environment for years to come.
Climate change isn’t a problem we can afford to pass on to the next generation. Let’s do everything in our power to leave a healthy planet for our children and grandchildren.
**[Sign on as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Protect the West Act_ today: ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60422116/397053116/434499906?refcode=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230319_PM1_V1_S3&ms=AU_JC_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230319_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDMwM2JiYy03OWM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WdVly_bt1xugQcK7bWzBln2utklyO5pNcd7RZgiSUJg=&emci=cc303bbc-79c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=cd303bbc-79c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=29801744)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: INVASION
body:
|
---
| | 🤦🏻♂️🤦🏻♂️🤦🏻♂️

Question...

Why did Speaker of the House Mike Moyle send SJM101, a purported "border security immigration reform" issue, to the House Agriculture committee instead of its appropriate committee, House State Affairs?

_The answer is clear._

Those advocating for **amnesty for illegal immigrants in Idaho** are well aware that it will easily pass in the Agriculture committee.

It's concerning to see this kind of push for amnesty coming from Idahoans, when it's typically a stance taken by Democrats in places like California and Washington, D.C.

**It's crucial that we act now and make our voices heard.**

This is not an Idaho solution, but rather a misguided attempt to follow in California's footsteps.

Let's email Mike and urge him to move SJM101 to the House State Affairs Committee where it rightfully belongs.

You can reach him at:

[**MMoyle@house.idaho.gov**](mailto:MMoyle@house.idaho.gov)

Cheers,

Brian

**p.s.**

Who would have thought, after I moved here almost 14 years ago, that I'd have to fight against granting amnesty for illegals... in Idaho?

And it's homegrown Idahoans pushing this!

We tried to kill it in the Senate last week, but only 10 brave Republicans voted NO (we needed 18 to kill it).

This isn't being brought by the people of Idaho - _**I haven't received even ONE EMAIL from an Idahoan in favor of this.**_

No, this is being pushed by Big Ag, IACI, and other special interests who want cheap foreign labor.

Can you believe it's Republicans advancing this??!

_I'm still in shock. _

So, while you're at it, email the House Ag committee and let them know what you think of the SJM101 amnesty memorial...

subject: Our American way of life is UNDER ATTACK!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452059:6gPxrnGN3:m:1:3365131770:125AB2592D95DB8E71CCA7F69B251DEC:r)
---
Peter, we're under attack.

But not from any foreign adversary; _we're under attack from within._ **And the aggressor is the Democrat Party.

** At this very moment, Americans like you and me are being attacked for our beliefs, our ideals, and our morals.
| [ **PROTECT OUR COUNTRY!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452059:6gPxrnGN3:m:1:3365131770:125AB2592D95DB8E71CCA7F69B251DEC:r)
---
Make no mistake: All across the country, radical leftists are trying to change the fundamental American way of life that we know and love.

**Enough is enough.[ Will you stand with thousands of fellow patriots to help us put an end to these liberal attacks?

](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452059:6gPxrnGN3:m:1:3365131770:125AB2592D95DB8E71CCA7F69B251DEC:r)** Never before in our country's history have we seen one party:
* **FORCE** gender identities on our children
* **LABEL** parents as terrorists for trying to protect their children
* **IGNORE** the invasion of human traffickers and drug smugglers pouring across our southern border

**But now that is exactly what we are seeing - a party that appears committed to destroying our country from within.** And it's time for conservatives across the country to stand together and put an end to this liberal madness. [**Can I count on you to join us?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452059:6gPxrnGN3:m:1:3365131770:125AB2592D95DB8E71CCA7F69B251DEC:r) I'm fighting for our country in Washington, D.C., and I need true patriots like you all across the country to fight back against these insane liberal agendas.
| [ **STAND UP TO THE DEMOCRATS!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452059:6gPxrnGN3:m:1:3365131770:125AB2592D95DB8E71CCA7F69B251DEC:r)
---
**We have to step up to stop our communities and our country from being torn apart from within by the Democrats.

** We have to step up RIGHT NOW to protect the greatest country in the world, a country that has lifted more people out of poverty, provided a better standard of living, and made a better life for more people than ANY OTHER country in history.

[**Will you join the fight?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452059:6gPxrnGN3:m:1:3365131770:125AB2592D95DB8E71CCA7F69B251DEC:r) Thank you,

Harriet Hageman
| **PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd0eb7b0-2055-4b49-9dae-73c8093643f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Gretchen Whitmer (via Democrats.org)
subject: Derek, did you happen to catch me on MSNBC today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We’ve made a lot of progress, but the GOP is determined to tear it all down. Their priorities are clear, so it's up to us to stop them. | |
---
Derek -- It’s Gretchen Whitmer. Did you happen to catch me on MSNBC today? I went live to tell Americans about Democratic accomplishments under President Biden and Vice President Harris’s leadership -- and to make the case for electing Democrats nationwide in the months and years ahead. With the help of this team, we’ve rebuilt the economy and added 12 million jobs, lowered costs for working families, and passed historic legislation like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the _Inflation Reduction Act_. Here in Michigan, thanks to our trifecta Democratic control that the DNC helped elect, in the last two weeks, we passed new protections for LGBTQ+ families and legislation to protect abortion rights. Michiganders have felt the benefits, and I know we’re just getting started. **We’ve made a lot of progress, Derek -- but the GOP is determined to tear it all down.** Their priorities are clear: A nationwide abortion ban, jeopardizing bedrock programs like Social Security and Medicare that millions of Americans rely on, and tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy and the biggest corporations. **_It's up to us to stop them._ Will you chip in $7 today to help build the foundation for the strongest party in history and hold Republicans accountable for their attacks?**

clean_body: We’ve made a lot of progress, but the GOP is determined to tear it all down. Their priorities are clear, so it's up to us to stop them. | | Derek -- It’s Gretchen Whitmer. Did you happen to catch me on MSNBC today? I went live to tell Americans about Democratic accomplishments under President Biden and Vice President Harris’s leadership -- and to make the case for electing Democrats nationwide in the months and years ahead. With the help of this team, we’ve rebuilt the economy and added 12 million jobs, lowered costs for working families, and passed historic legislation like the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law and the Inflation Reduction Act. Here in Michigan, thanks to our trifecta Democratic control that the DNC helped elect, in the last two weeks, we passed new protections for LGBTQ+ families and legislation to protect abortion rights. Michiganders have felt the benefits, and I know we’re just getting started. We’ve made a lot of progress, Derek -- but the GOP is determined to tear it all down. Their priorities are clear: A nationwide abortion ban, jeopardizing bedrock programs like Social Security and Medicare that millions of Americans rely on, and tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy and the biggest corporations. It's up to us to stop them. Will you chip in $7 today to help build the foundation for the strongest party in history and hold Republicans accountable for their attacks? The DNC is the only party organization tasked with electing Democrats up and down the ballot in every zip code nationwide. That means they help elect Democrats from school board to Senate, which is only possible with the support and dedication of this grassroots team. When you chip in to the DNC today, you’ll be supporting critical programs like on-the-ground organizing, voter protection efforts, and the data and technology infrastructure that Democrats rely on to win. When you donate now, you’re helping ensure Democrats have the tools and resources they need to keep winning in 2023, 2024, and beyond. Peter,

Have you heard of Sheriff David Clarke Jr.? In case you haven’t, here’s
what you need to know about him

1. He’s a former local elected official in Wisconsin who has touted the
most extreme views on reproductive rights, voting rights, crime,
immigration, and more. While in office, he encouraged Trump supporters
to take up “pitchforks and torches” to fight Democrats and the media
and encouraged January 6 insurrectionists not to cooperate with
federal authorities.

2. After resigning from office, Clarke worked for Donald Trump and Steve
Bannon — supporting their work to overturn elections, scam donors in a
“build the wall” scheme, and stoke up hate against marginalized
communities. He repeatedly spread conspiracy theories and lies — so
much so that he was banned from Fox News!

3. He’s considering a run for the U.S. Senate right here in Wisconsin.
And based on points 1 and 2, along with everything else we know about
him, we have to keep him as far away from the chamber as possible.

Peter, David Clarke isn’t just a right-wing talking head — he
has some extremely harmful and hateful positions, and we need to take his
potential candidacy for the Senate incredibly seriously.

name: Emilia Sykes HQ
subject: Standing with workers across Northeast Ohio.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Today, as we work to create an economy where everyone can succeed, Emilia knows strengthening unions and codifying worker protections are essential to doing just that.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60424112/397058785/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.19_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE1NGQzOC04M2M2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBsD0GDGwmteRMOL-I2scSs8YTsgEIf_iDEMZHCN-YI=)
Peter,

**Unions created the middle class here in Northeast Ohio.** Union workers’ abilities to collectively bargain for higher wages, better benefits, and safer working conditions provided countless Ohio families with tickets to the middle class and financial prosperity.

Today, as we work to create an economy where everyone can succeed, Emilia knows strengthening unions and codifying worker protections are essential to doing just that.

_That’s why she’s a proud co-sponsor of _The PRO Act__ – a historic piece of legislation that, if enacted, would hold anti-labor employers accountable and empower Americans to exercise their right to unionize.

**We believe it’s past time for Congress to act to ensure every worker can collectively bargain for the wages, benefits, and conditions they deserve.[But Peter, to enact meaningful change, we need to know you’re with us. Will you stand with Emilia and sign our petition in support of strengthening organized labor across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60424113/397058786/1053497619?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE1NGQzOC04M2M2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBsD0GDGwmteRMOL-I2scSs8YTsgEIf_iDEMZHCN-YI=&emci=660faeca-f3c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ca154d38-83c6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=11703046)**

---

Thank you,

Team Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60424115/397058788/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.19_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE1NGQzOC04M2M2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBsD0GDGwmteRMOL-I2scSs8YTsgEIf_iDEMZHCN-YI=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60424116/397058789/-1745762055?refcode=em_eng_2023.03.19_b1_eshq_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTE1NGQzOC04M2M2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IBsD0GDGwmteRMOL-I2scSs8YTsgEIf_iDEMZHCN-YI=)

subject: I think it's time to clean house and start over. What do you think?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**
body:
| | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452058:JM2x1nGN5:m:1:3391001263:B3360E0690BDAEC425F9C4196329F946:r)
---
Peter, I have a simple question for you: [**Does our federal government need to be fumigated?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452058:JM2x1nGN5:m:1:3391001263:B3360E0690BDAEC425F9C4196329F946:r)
| [ **RESPOND NOW!** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452058:JM2x1nGN5:m:1:3391001263:B3360E0690BDAEC425F9C4196329F946:r)
---
There is so much corruption in Washington, DC in the current administration and our federal agencies like the FBI and DOJ.

I've always said that sunlight is the best disinfectant - especially when it comes to exposing the corruption and the criminals in our government. [**Do you agree?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452058:JM2x1nGN5:m:1:3391001263:B3360E0690BDAEC425F9C4196329F946:r) We're seeing bureaucrats in the Department of Justice, FBI, and Department of Homeland Security, engaging in blatantly illegal acts.

I think it's time to clean house and start over.[ **What do you think?

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452058:JM2x1nGN5:m:1:3391001263:B3360E0690BDAEC425F9C4196329F946:r) I'm reaching out to true patriots like you to see what you think. [**Click here to let me know your thoughts.

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62452058:JM2x1nGN5:m:1:3391001263:B3360E0690BDAEC425F9C4196329F946:r) I look forward to seeing your response.

Thank you, Harriet Hageman
| **PAID FOR BY HAGEMAN FOR WYOMING**

State Democrats are facing a slew of special elections over the next two months – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.

name: Sandra Bishop, Emerge
subject: Let's talk about trust, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
| | |
---
| | _Today is Women in Public Office Day.[**Will you donate $10 or more now to help Emerge recruit, train, and empower bold Democratic women in every state?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60425430/397062448/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1166-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMmE5NmYyLTg4YzYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o_K3qZzsLoNfUNX9w3ga0-t9_mCBeASbvrTcu-aRrH8=)_
---
Peter, so much of our well-being, from community safety to the cost of living, depends on the quality and commitment of our leadership.
That’s why today, on **Women in Public Office Day** , I’m reflecting on how critical representation is. We must elevate leaders that we can count on to represent us at every level of government. **That's why our work at Emerge is so important.**
Right now, communities everywhere are trusting Emerge women to step up and deliver the policies that will make a difference where it matters most. Whether it’s State Del. Danica Roem safeguarding the rights of LGBTQ+ Virginians or State Rep. Andrea Valderrama fighting to enshrine reproductive rights for Oregonians into law, Emerge women are working to protect and uplift all our communities across the country. **But they can’t do it alone. **
**Emerge is the only organization that is 100% dedicated to recruiting, training, and empowering Democratic women of the New American Majority to run for office and win.** But we rely on supporters like you to keep our programs funded, so we can grow our ranks in every state – at every level of our government.
**[So please, Peter, I’m personally asking you to join us in powering this crucial work. Will you donate $10 or more now – for Women in Public Office Day – to help Emerge empower bold Democratic women to run for office, win, and continue the fight for our communities?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60425431/397062449/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1166-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMmE5NmYyLTg4YzYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o_K3qZzsLoNfUNX9w3ga0-t9_mCBeASbvrTcu-aRrH8=)**
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60425432/397062450/-1657939538?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1166-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMmE5NmYyLTg4YzYtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o_K3qZzsLoNfUNX9w3ga0-t9_mCBeASbvrTcu-aRrH8=)

Thank you so much for your support,
Sandra Bishop
Chief Development Officer, Emerge

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A little about my canary pin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425443/397062480/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk63-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJhOTZmMi04OGM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e1RA2atjf4gvitPDM9wojAKZHS49DDbu5T42vSuJuso=)
Friend,

On the lapel of my suits (suits that I admit are sometimes rumpled), I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage. It was given to me decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally – and to this day**, I wear this canary instead of the official Senate pin. Let me tell you why:**
In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners would bring canaries deep into the mines to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that _cared enough_ to protect them.
Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights and women’s rights and civil rights. Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work, friend.
**I wear my canary pin as a symbol of all the progress we've made and as a reminder that our fight for the Dignity of Work – _all_ work – is far from over. ****This fight is why I'm running for reelection.**
**To defend my seat and keep up this important fight, I need grassroots support from folks like you. That's why I'm personally asking: **[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now so we can win in Ohio, protect our Democratic Senate majority and continue making progress for workers and families across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425444/397062481/691330013?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk63-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJhOTZmMi04OGM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e1RA2atjf4gvitPDM9wojAKZHS49DDbu5T42vSuJuso=)
Thank you. I'm humbled to have folks like you standing alongside me in this fight.

In solidarity,

Sherrod

clean_body: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. | | | = Friend, On the lapel of my suits (suits that I admit are sometimes rumpled), I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a birdcage. It was given to me decades ago by a Lorain steelworker at a Workers' Memorial Day rally – and to this day, I wear this canary instead of the official Senate pin. Let me tell you why: In the early days of the 20th century, coal miners would bring canaries deep into the mines to warn them of poisonous gasses. Back then, workers didn't have a union strong enough or a government that cared enough to protect them. Together, we changed that. We passed worker safety laws and overtime pay. We banned child labor. We passed clean air and safe drinking water laws. We enacted Social Security and Medicare, and workers’ rights and women’s rights and civil rights. Because when you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work, friend. I wear my canary pin as a symbol of all the progress we've made and as a reminder that our fight for the Dignity of Work – all work – is far from over. This fight is why I'm running for reelection. To defend my seat and keep up this important fight, I need grassroots support from folks like you. That's why I'm personally asking: = Thank you. I'm humbled to have folks like you standing alongside me in this fight. In solidarity, Sherrod | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

---
[ Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) has reportedly been ignored by Vice President Kamala Harris after failing to endorse Harris as President Joe Biden’s running mate in 2024. Warren has reportedly attempted to apologize twice to Harris for her comments, but Harris has not returned her calls. During a Boston Public Radio interview in January, Warren seemed to hesitate when asked if Harris should be Biden’s running mate, stating that she wanted to defer to what makes Biden comfortable with his team. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653514%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v6FzGo3cr8viklut1skiBw&sysid=1)

name: Molly McGuire
subject: Of sales taxes, fish, and trains —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425683/397063905/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)
---

| | It's been a busy few weeks for our Senator, Jeff Merkley. Here's the latest (and fair warning: there's been a lot of Republican malarkey.) **[For starters, Senator Merkley is calling out the boneheaded idea to dissolve the IRS and institute a federal sales tax of up to 30%!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425686/397063909/441381590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)** You really need to hear what Jeff said about it to Eugene's KVAL:**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425690/397063913/441381590?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)** You've probably heard a lot about the catastrophic train accident in Ohio that spewed toxic chemicals. Here in Oregon we're no strangers to train derailments, especially after the catastrophe in Moiser in 2016. But Jeff is working hard to hold the railroads accountable. **[Check out the news about a recent Senate hearing where Senator Merkley held the railroad CEO's feet to the fire.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425694/397063917/610046935?q=https://scrippsnews.com/stories/senator-to-press-railroad-ceo-on-cash-awards-after-hearing/&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1679076708122544&usg=AOvVaw0NH5NzLHR-ta4j7XY1FhFw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)** I don't know about you, but I don't think people should be impoverished simply because they need insulin to live. I know Jeff agrees. **[Read about the bill he introduced to cap the price of insulin so people won't be price gouged by greedy pharma corporations.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425698/397063921/610046935?q=https://ktvz.com/news/oregon-northwest/2023/03/13/merkley-introduces-bill-to-cap-list-price-of-insulin-at-20-a-vial/&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1679076708126700&usg=AOvVaw0DYmwfrNwy4FI0AK-AY-r5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)** _Traveling for spring break?_**[Read about the new bill Jeff just introduced with Senator Ron Wyden to protect our privacy at the airport](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425701/397063926/610046935?q=https://www.kxl.com/oregon-senators-merkley-and-wyden-introduce-facial-recognition-and-biometric-technology-moratorium-act/&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1679076708124259&usg=AOvVaw2uNyzklFJehRUgC2Y2Augx&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)**. The TSA has started using facial recognition at major airports around the country. I think we can all agree no one really wants to be tracked by the government. Have you heard that **[Senator Merkley and Senator Wyden are trying to help local fishermen by helping feed hungry kids here in Oregon](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425704/397063929/610046935?q=https://kval.com/news/local/lawmakers-push-relief-for-west-coast-seafood-industry&sa=D&source=docs&ust=1679076708123522&usg=AOvVaw39nGUnnFP3z00nwh9wBrBS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjlmYWI1Mi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qBerBme4Dg7_aWev5Pc5dPdh3c_Skh4UuKothEL4nWM=&emci=09146640-19c5-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=069fab52-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=7731215)**? It's a win-win! clean_body: | | | | It's been a busy few weeks for our Senator, Jeff Merkley. Here's the latest (and fair warning: there's been a lot of Republican malarkey.) You really need to hear what Jeff said about it to Eugene's KVAL: You've probably heard a lot about the catastrophic train accident in Ohio that spewed toxic chemicals. Here in Oregon we're no strangers to train derailments, especially after the catastrophe in Moiser in 2016. But Jeff is working hard to hold the railroads accountable. I don't know about you, but I don't think people should be impoverished simply because they need insulin to live. I know Jeff agrees. Traveling for spring break?. The TSA has started using facial recognition at major airports around the country. I think we can all agree no one really wants to be tracked by the government. Have you heard that ? It's a win-win! More later, Molly McGuire Team Merkley | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Wes Moore
subject: Women’s history is Maryland’s history.
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60425731/397063986/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2MwNGNkMi04YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OhjbkHaDp6_UWkq-VKrL30Ga5nHbJJzLgE9Yw9NHuRE=&emci=5fc04cd2-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=63c04cd2-8bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
Hi friends, March is **Women’s History Month** , a time for us to recognize trailblazing women past and present who play a core role in creating a better, more inclusive society. As Governor, I am proud to work alongside a team of exceptional women, including Maryland’s first South Asian woman lieutenant governor, Aruna Miller, Speaker Adrienne Jones, and many remarkable leaders in our General Assembly. I couldn’t ask for better partners in this work to move Maryland forward. |
---
Long before I was elected Governor, many important women in my life believed in me when I didn’t believe in myself: my mom (who raised me and my sisters as a working single mother), my late grandmother (Mama Win), my sisters, my aunts, and multiple teachers. And of course, my wife Dawn inspires and motivates me every day.
---
It wasn’t until I was 14 years old that my mom got her first job that offered benefits and a livable wage, enabling her to work just one job instead of multiple. Whether it’s addressing continued income inequality or the ongoing attacks against women’s reproductive choice, my administration is working to build a more equitable Maryland and protecting the rights of women across our state.
Together, we’re fighting for paid family leave, enshrining the reproductive rights granted in _Roe v. Wade_ into our state constitution, establishing equal pay, and ensuring every family has access to quality, affordable child care.
I want to take this opportunity to thank Aruna, Dawn, my mother, my sisters, and the countless women across Maryland who lift us up with your courage, hard work, skills, and love. Women’s history is Maryland’s history.
Elevate,
Wes

Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense.

name: Team Beshear
subject: Kentucky's economy is booming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Kentucky's red-hot economy keeps getting stronger. Peter — **Under Andy's leadership, Kentucky had its two best economic years on record, and it's showing no signs of slowing down!**

Just last week, Andy announced **$34 million** in state funds are headed to communities across the Commonwealth to support new, good-paying jobs and economic growth. This is just the latest economic development in Andy's first three years as governor.

_**So far, Andy's administration has:**_

🔹 Achieved the longest period of the **lowest unemployment rate** in Kentucky history;

🔹 Cemented Kentucky as the **electric vehicle battery production capital of the United States** with several record-breaking economic development projects;

🔹 Boosted workforce participation with key investments in **clean water, health care, high-speed internet, infrastructure,** and so much more!

**[We're working to ensure Kentucky stays on track with this progress. But with our first filing deadline of the election year approaching, we need your help! subject: Trump judge & Christian Right activist, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, is about to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone--one of the more popular & safest methods of obtaining an abortion in the U.S. Can you support the fightback today?
body:
No more medication abortion?
| | | | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | | | | Peter, **_An obscure Trump judge & Christian Right activist, Matthew J. Kacsmaryk, is about to overturn the FDA's approval of mifepristone--one of the more popular & safest methods of obtaining an abortion in the U.S._** **_Not only will the unqualified hack who's attacked contraception & LGBTQ rights __ban mifepristone in red states, but in the United States. _Yep, blue states too__. _THIS. IS. NOT. A DRILL._** [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in donating $5, $10, or $50, to the Center for Reproductive Rights, who formed the Abortion Defense Network to fight every one of these sick attacks on our fundamental rights as Americans?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tffd6b450-95d8-45ff-82a2-5139f8075c06/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**_His ruling will go beyond Dobbs: Yes, a_**_ _**_ national ban_** _. B__ _ecause one white, male, extremist thinks he knows better than the vast majority of lawyers, judges, doctors, FDA and scores of European countries that legalized mifepristone_.

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d53402d-0897-478f-b79d-4caaf244bdac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Paul Vallas is a dangerous bully
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, the contrast
between progressive Brandon Johnson and fake Democrat Paul Vallas could
not be greater.

Brandon Johnson is the candidate listening to and working with the people
of Chicago to build a vision for the future that supports them. Vallas is
an echo of his conservative extremist donors.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230319_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1011&akid=4130%2E5885482%2EdA_4cC ]We need to make sure Chicago is a safe place for LGBTQ+ people, for
anyone seeking reproductive care like abortions, and for teachers,
communities of color, and everyone in Chicago. Can I count on you to pitch
in to help close our $5,327 budget gap before our deadline?

----Begin Forwarded Message----

Peter Willis,

This week, progressive candidate, union
organizer, and former teacher Brandon Johnson faced off in a debate
against fake Democrat, anti-abortion extremist Paul Vallas.

Just like in the last debate, Vallas refused to take accountability for
anything. He dodged and avoided addressing anything related to his history
of consistently aligning with conservative outlets and organizations.

He smoothed over his endorsement from Republican billionaire Ken Griffin
and his personal social media accounts liking Trump talking points,
comments attacking Democrats, and comments attacking the city of Chicago.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230319_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1012&akid=4130%2E5885482%2EdA_4cC ]With just over two weeks until the election, we need your help raising
$10,249 by Sunday at midnight to mobilize our 100,000+ supporters in

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Michigan will be competitive in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi,

The misleading attack ads that were just launched against our campaign are a reminder that the 2024 race has already started and we need to get to work.

Out-of-state dark money groups know that our district will be one of the most competitive ones in 2024, which is why they’re already launching attacks in Frontline districts like ours.

**And now that we’ve been labeled a top GOP target for 2024, we know more is still to come.

With our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly public filing deadline coming up at the end of the month, I know more dark-money groups will be looking at our report to see if we have what it takes to take them on and win again in 2024.**

Can I count on you to chip in $15 or any amount to our campaign today so we can break through the lies of these attack ads? Now is the time to make early investments in this race so we can keep Michigan blue in 2024. Here’s the link to donate:

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/march-eoq-deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60427427/397072698/-630420539?amount=15&contactdata=OvbiTX/ZkepWGruJ/9mikx8+Vj4zQt2Qe75XCaeCgIEdWE4CzEXG3bpRrWIF1ok84Q35N/blyqo7zF1EPSXPgGulfUlghF/y/h0h3Tjhd6vfzozYhOxy+fr3cXy5h/kgu/YNaRtn1RjRwoFGrrht1Q==&refcode2=b4468bce-9bc6-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&source=EM_NBI_DK_2023019_FR_1.3_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ2OGJjZS05YmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6WGZQY7nBGwggm3OH2sgT2byycxq9k4YYOPY-mKTULk=)**

Thank you so much,
Dan

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. clean_body: | Hi, The misleading attack ads that were just launched against our campaign are a reminder that the 2024 race has already started and we need to get to work. Out-of-state dark money groups know that our district will be one of the most competitive ones in 2024, which is why they’re already launching attacks in Frontline districts like ours. And now that we’ve been labeled a top GOP target for 2024, we know more is still to come. With our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly public filing deadline coming up at the end of the month, I know more dark-money groups will be looking at our report to see if we have what it takes to take them on and win again in 2024. Can I count on you to chip in $15 or any amount to our campaign today so we can break through the lies of these attack ads? Now is the time to make early investments in this race so we can keep Michigan blue in 2024. Here’s the link to donate: = Thank you so much, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

name: Katie Porter
subject: Record corporate profits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I’ll always stand up to Big Oil and call them out on their BS.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19670%2E3422442%2E6KgAN4)
Derek,
Last year, Big Oil executives took advantage of all of us while raking in jaw-dropping profits.
**In 2022 alone, the five largest oil companies made a record-breaking $199.3 billion (yes, that’s _billion_ with a ‘B’).**
That’s why in the spring of 2022 I introduced legislation to make Big Oil’s price gouging illegal. While it passed in the House, the Senate never even brought it up for a vote.
**I’ll always stand up to Big Oil and call them out on their BS.** But I need your help if I’m going to take our fight to the U.S. Senate.
I have never accepted money from corporate PACs, and I’m one of only a dozen Members of Congress who has never accepted money from federal lobbyists—including those lobbying on behalf of Big Oil companies. This means my opponents who have accepted money from corporate PACs and lobbyists have a huge cash advantage over me—**which makes your contribution of $5 that much more important, Derek.**
**[Chip in today to help send me to the U.S. Senate so I can continue to hold Big Oil accountable and fight on behalf of families across the country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230319-1?refcode=em20230319-1&refcode2=19670_3422442_6KgAN4&akid=19670%2E3422442%2E6KgAN4)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230319-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF19_1_OIL_20230319_V1_F&refcode2=19670_3422442_6KgAN4&akid=19670%2E3422442%2E6KgAN4)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF19_1_OIL_20230319_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19670_3422442_6KgAN4&akid=19670%2E3422442%2E6KgAN4)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=19670%2E3422442%2E6KgAN4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19670%2E3422442%2E6KgAN4)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
