**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

We need your help to make our voices heard.

Derek, The EPA defines Environmental Justice as the fair treatment and meaningful involvement of all people regardless of race, color, national origin, or income as it pertains to the development, implementation, and enforcement of environmental laws, regulations, and policies. It’s something we should commit ourselves to achieving every single day when considering how to best protect our environment. But you and I both know that GOP lawmakers have no interest in upholding environmental protection OR environmental justice. **[If you care about upholding environmental justice, we need you to contribute to our effort to retake the General Assembly, kick the GOP majority to the curb, and start building the Virginia we want to see.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60428252/397075874/-361892355?refcode=dpva-em-230319-justice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGJiYzk2Yy1hNmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zco0ojzZsvEqM4w_yU2aA3Sksat8vxXAVAlf70HRI0=)** If we want to be heard, we need to retake the General Assembly and MAKE our voices heard. **[Will you chip in today to help VADEMS take back the General Assembly and uphold environmental justice in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60428253/397075875/-361892355?refcode=dpva-em-230319-justice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGJiYzk2Yy1hNmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zco0ojzZsvEqM4w_yU2aA3Sksat8vxXAVAlf70HRI0=)** VADEMS | **********[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60428254/397075876/-882855490?refcode=dpva-em-230319-justice&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGJiYzk2Yy1hNmM2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4zco0ojzZsvEqM4w_yU2aA3Sksat8vxXAVAlf70HRI0=)**********

In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee. Kevin McCarthy is obsessed with me. Why? That’s why we're working to fight back against these attacks. = | = McCarthy wants to replace my colleagues and me with Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, and George Santos. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60428312/397076135/1282154877?refcode=EM_FR_230227JT_N_JT_FULL_8_G_A_P1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmZmMDVmNi1hN2M2LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RT4QsgMGLmhYqobcXKYPbNSmZ4HPGqThWubCwOag6J8=) Hey there,

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

name: Florida Update (via DLCC)
subject: Ron DeSantis wants Florida to be a model for GOP rule:
body:
With his MAGA allies in the state legislature, DeSantis’ extreme agenda already has the Florida GOP’s rubber stamp | | |
---
| | **Ron DeSantis is giving state Republicans a blueprint for GOP extremism.** He just laid out his right-wing priorities ahead of Florida’s legislative session as state legislators move to enact their extreme agenda including: ✖ Banning abortion at six weeks
✖ Attacking the LGBTQ+ community from criminalizing drag shows to restricting transgender rights
✖ Expanding gun access by scaling back licensing requirements and **encouraging school employees to carry guns**
✖ Targeting educators and students by slashing curriculum and banning books
**_...And much more_** With his MAGA allies in the state legislature, all of these policies and more could come to fruition. But DeSantis won’t stop there – **he wants Florida to be a model for Republicans across the country!** **Republican governors can’t act alone – they rely on support from state legislators to get their agenda off the ground.** That’s why it’s critical that we build our Democratic power in statehouses across the country, so we can fight back against extremists and defend our democracy from DeSantis’ brand of dangerous right-wing Republicanism. | | March 19, 2023
---
| WEEKLY NEWSLETTER
---
| Issue 5
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** This week, the world watched for the repercussions of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) fallout and how it will affect the worldwide market. The biggest question should be, “How did this happen?" As we peel back the onion to determine the “root cause,” one underlying issue emerges; the rise of woke ideology instead of meritocracy. Over the last decade, the United States has witnessed a concerning trend in which meritocracy in business, the military, and education is increasingly sidelined in favor of what we know as “woke” ideology. This trend has grave consequences for our country's future. It undermines the fundamental principles of fairness, equality, and opportunity that have made America the land of the free and the home of the brave. We must get back to the basics. We must return to meritocracy to provide economic opportunity, educate our future workforce, and defend our country. It is time to reject the cancer of woke ideology and embrace the American spirit of innovation, hard work, and excellence. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=57202d6da2da4126bf825e19c223fa49&_e=R9de8x-v2XI4RRRLHV_V_WuEcLtcK09wtOPP9l-plW8UFw9YSgszYu4wS37jVQj1QIIq4EBbTg5QhZuNhaOnNiWxtyg4NqdHmuI1aagwUFdn51NZ-78qq6sdFw7zD3pqCXXnCQG2EnGg34yq5QqJjwzFSQ1o0vXQOTBdMDqLKkfixZg2UH6YNbuUN4FH1YqPcocyFGa_LvEXe8zcx9XJ97Dlult7r_WhVHFuy3Xabo47Qf25gLZ2gSazCICk7ao1TioHytE2DdeCeRJ4pV6svIQ-R4f8ltTyMrzQd_UUldY%3D)
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | March 19, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 5 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) This week, the world watched for the repercussions of the Silicon Valley Bank (SVB) fallout and how it will affect the worldwide market. The biggest question should be, “How did this happen?" As we peel back the onion to determine the “root cause,” one underlying issue emerges; the rise of woke ideology instead of meritocracy. Over the last decade, the United States has witnessed a concerning trend in which meritocracy in business, the military, and education is increasingly sidelined in favor of what we know as “woke” ideology. This trend has grave consequences for our country's future. It undermines the fundamental principles of fairness, equality, and opportunity that have made America the land of the free and the home of the brave. We must get back to the basics. We must return to meritocracy to provide economic opportunity, educate our future workforce, and defend our country. It is time to reject the cancer of woke ideology and embrace the American spirit of innovation, hard work, and excellence. \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | Charlottesville radio personality Joe Thomas speaks with Hung Cao Cao reflects on the progress made in Virginia’s tenth district during the 2022 cycle, taking a Democrat+ 19 district and cutting that down by 13 points. He also shares how equity ideology is preventing students have been prepared for the workplace and affecting the training and readiness of our armed forces. Listen to the full interview for more on how the U.S. should reassess its handling of Chinese aggression. | Hung Cao Joins The Scott Sands Show On Tuesday afternoon, Hung spoke with Scott Sands to give his immediate reaction to news of a US drone being struck down by Russian fighter jets. This is a clear escalation by Russia. Hung points out the need for balance in the United States' approach to the war in Ukraine. The spread of socialism is scaring me more than ever before.

Everywhere I go in Iowa, I hear from businesses, small and large, that they can’t find workers.
